content:
### Scene
Mirror selfie in an otaku-style computer corner, blue color tone.

### Subject
* Gender expression: female
* Age: around 25
* Ethnicity: East Asian
* Body type: slim, with a defined waist; natural body proportions
* Skin tone: light neutral tone
* Hairstyle:
    * Length: waist-length hair
    * Style: straight with slightly curled ends
    * Color: medium brown
* Pose:
    * Stance: standing in a slight contrapposto pose
    * Right hand: holding a smartphone in front of her face (identity hidden)
    * Left arm: naturally hanging down alongside the torso
    * Torso: body leaning slightly back; waist and abdomen exposed
* Clothing:
    * Top: light blue cropped knit cardigan, top two buttons fastened; a blue French-style bra faintly visible
    * Bottom: denim ultra-short shorts, with a blue satin ribbon bow on each side of the hips
    * Socks: blue and white horizontal striped over-the-knee socks
    * Accessory: a blue cute mascot phone case

### Environment
* Description: bedroom computer corner seen through a wall-mounted mirror
* Furnishings:
    * White desk
    * Single monitor showing a soft blue wallpaper (no readable text)
    * Mechanical keyboard with white keycaps on a blue desk mat
    * Mouse on a small blue mouse pad
    * PC tower on the right side with blue case lighting
    * Three anime figures on or near the PC tower
    * A poster of a pagoda on the wall
    * Cat-shaped desk lamp with blue accents
    * A transparent glass of water
    * A tall green leafy plant by the window (on the left side of the frame)
* Color replacement: replace all originally pink elements (clothes and room decor) with blue tones (baby blue to sky blue/periwinkle blue).

### Lighting
* Light source: daylight coming from a large window on the left side of the camera, through sheer curtains
* Light quality: soft, diffused light
* White balance (K): 5200

### Camera
* Mode: smartphone rear camera shooting via the mirror (no portrait/bokeh mode)
* Equivalent focal length (mm): 26
* Distances (m):
    * Subject to mirror: 0.6
    * Camera to mirror: 0.5
* Exposure:
    * Aperture (f): 1.8
    * ISO: 100
    * Shutter speed (s): 0.01
    * Exposure compensation (EV): -0.3
* Focus: focus on the torso and shorts in the mirror image
* Depth of field: natural smartphone deep depth of field; background clearly visible with no artificial blur
* Composition:
    * Aspect ratio: 1:1
    * Crop: from the top of the head to mid-thigh; include the desk, monitor, PC tower, and plant in the frame
    * Angle: slightly high angle from the mirror’s point of view
    * Composition note: keep the subject centered; to avoid wide-angle edge distortion, have her stand a bit further away and crop to a square later.

### Negative prompts
* Any appearance of pink/magenta anywhere
* Beauty filters/over-smoothed skin; poreless skin look
* Exaggerated or distorted anatomy
* NSFW, see-through fabrics, wardrobe malfunctions
* Logos, brand names, or readable user interface text
* Fake portrait-mode blur, CGI/illustration feel

content: A medium-scale cinematic portrait captures a {argument name="subject" default="young male adult"} looking thoughtfully away to the right with a candid, serious expression, closed neutral mouth, and relaxed shoulders. He wears a {argument name="clothing" default="black unbuttoned dress shirt"}, his natural, textured dark hair pushed back with slight flyaways. His body is turned at a 45-degree angle, leaning his weight to the right in an organic, casual posture. His left hand rests casually on a stainless steel safety railing, his thumb resting on top while holding a small dark object, as his fingers curl naturally over the edge, mirrored by his right hand which curls loosely over the pristine top metal bar. Beyond the thin horizontal wire cables of the railing stretches a deep spatial midground dominated by calm dark lake water that perfectly reflects long vertical streaks of warm yellow and green lights. The deep background reveals a {argument name="setting" default="luxurious European lakeside setting"} where bright city lights are clustered heavily on the lower left shoreline, trailing upward along the hillside, while a dark silhouette of rolling mountain peaks rests beneath a clear, deep twilight blue night sky featuring two faint stars vertically aligned in the upper center. The atmosphere is dramatic yet serene and contemplative, anchored by a complementary cool temperature palette of deep blues, inky blacks, warm golden oranges, and bright yellows. A strong, highly directional off-camera artificial warm golden light hits him directly from a 45-degree angle on the front-left, acting as hard low-key illumination. This creates harsh, defined deep black shadows cast heavily on the right side of his face, under his chin, and deep within the intricate folds of his shirt, while preserving brilliant warm highlights perfectly placed across his face, exposed chest, and left shoulder. Shot as a realistic digital photograph with a straight-on perspective and a slightly soft sharpness, the image embraces a travel lifestyle aesthetic characterized by moderate high-ISO digital noise authentic to low-light night photography. A deep depth of field keeps both the subject and the distant mountain structures relatively sharp, enhanced by post-processing that crushes the blacks in the mountains and shirt while boosting the warm highlights to make the city reflections pop brilliantly against the desaturated cool sky, all framed in a 4:5 aspect ratio.

content:
A high-resolution indoor lifestyle portrait photograph of {argument name="subject name" default="[NAME]"}.
​Captured in a medium-full shot from a slightly low angle, she leans casually and confidently forward against a {argument name="location" default="kitchen counter"}, her torso projecting slightly toward the camera. Her right arm extends down, gripping the counter's edge for support, while her left hand rests gently on her thigh. She has her hair gracefully swept to one side, looking directly at the camera with expressive, slightly narrowed eyes and a playful, confident, subtle smile. Her skin features a highly realistic, glowing texture with fine pores visible under the light. She is dressed in a plain, {argument name="clothing" default="white, form-fitting cropped tank top"} that reveals her midriff, paired with high-waisted black dolphin sports shorts featuring white piping and a white drawstring tied in a bow at the front.
​The setting is a modern, well-lit domestic kitchen with a playful, alluring, and casual vibe. The background showcases light brown wooden lower cabinets with silver handles, a black countertop with integrated stove knobs, a white square-tile backsplash, and upper wooden cabinets. Subtle props like hanging kitchen utensils (a spatula and ladle) and a metal sink faucet blend into the elegantly blurred background. Bright, soft natural daylight streams through a large window on the left, casting a delicate rim light on her hair and the left side of her body, while creating smooth, natural shadow transitions on her right side.
​Shot with a 35mm lens at f/2.8 to maintain sharp focus on her eyes and clothing texture while yielding a beautiful background bokeh on the tiles and kitchen details. The lighting is perfectly balanced, simulating ISO 200 and a 1/250s shutter speed to prevent overexposure from the window, ensuring impeccable white balance and perfectly retained shadow details. Aspect Ratio 9:16.

content: A young adult male sits centered on a weathered wooden fence, exuding an approachable, candid charm with a subtle closed smile, relaxed eyebrows, and a direct gaze. His swept-back brown hair features natural textural imperfections, complementing his light facial stubble. He is dressed casually in a {argument name="shirt" default="dark navy short-sleeve henley shirt"} and {argument name="pants" default="light beige linen trousers"}. His relaxed shoulders perfectly balance his centered weight, with his left hand resting naturally on his left thigh, fingers curving gently downward to reveal a silver metal watch. His right hand casually crosses over his left wrist, loosely holding a pair of folded black sunglasses, his wrist adorned with a silver chain bracelet and a black cord bracelet. He is seated on a rough-hewn timber split-rail fence in the foreground, characterized by rounded horizontal rails and natural wood grain, with tall vibrant green grass and wildflowers protruding nearby. Behind him unfolds a {argument name="landscape" default="majestic, deep-set alpine landscape"}, leading the eye directly to a dominant, pristine midground lake. He sits upon a vintage, dark mottled crushed velvet sofa in the foreground that anchors the composition, transitioning into a midground that features a heavy vintage throw pillow adorned with thick, metallic-looking fringe and dark patterned fabric directly beneath his left hand. The medium-depth background reveals a pristine, upscale lounge setting highlighted by an elegant matte wallpaper featuring an Art Deco repeating fan and shell motif inside arched geometric lines in a uniform black, white, and mid-gray pattern, meticulously enclosed within dark wood wall molding panel frames. The entire atmosphere is rendered in monochromatic, high-contrast black and white, defined by a single, highly directional, bright artificial hard light source positioned straight from the front. This intense, direct-flash illumination creates a dramatic, moody vintage Hollywood glamour aesthetic, casting harsh, deep black, defined short shadows under his chin, within the deep folds of the suit fabric, and throwing a sharp, distinct cast shadow directly onto the wall behind his head, while simultaneously preserving brilliant specular highlights on his forehead, nose, cheeks, the glossy sheen of his hair, the white t-shirt, and the metallic watch dial. Captured with the tack-sharp realism of direct-flash editorial photography using a 35mm equivalent lens at an f/5.6 or f/8 aperture for a deep depth of field, the straight-on perspective is refined through monochromatic post-processing with pushed contrast, crushed deep blacks, and a subtle 400 ISO film grain texture enhancing the facial features and clothing, all perfectly framed in a 4:5 aspect ratio.

With his weight shifted slightly back, his right hand rests casually inside his front right trouser pocket. Anchoring the left foreground is a weathered, warm gray-tan stone parapet exhibiting a raw, matte finish heavily textured with natural pitting, scuffs, and a curved top edge. Dominating this distant plane is a historic arched stone bridge lined with vintage yellow and ochre residential buildings, their small windows and classical architecture evoking the timeless essence of Florence. The scene is bathed in the golden, highly directional natural sunlight of late afternoon, emanating from a 45-degree front-left angle to strike with hard, bright intensity and slightly diffused edges. This single light source creates a dramatic, high-contrast atmosphere, carving deep black shadows into the intricate fabric folds of his coat, under his chin, and heavily across the right side of his face and torso. Perfectly placed specular highlights gleam across his left cheek, the bridge of his nose, the textured crown of his hair, the curvature of his sunglasses, and his left shoulder. The sophisticated, travel-inspired European mood is unified by a warm split-complementary palette of espresso, true black, amber, and slate blue. Rendered as a realistic digital photograph inspired by Pitti Uomo street style, the image is shot straight-on at eye level with a full-frame camera and an 85mm lens set to f/2.8, utilizing a fast 1/500s shutter speed at ISO 100 to ensure the subject is tack sharp against the smooth bokeh. content: A realistic outdoor low-angle smartphone selfie. The subject is a {argument name="subject" default="young adult Korean woman"} standing beneath a clear blue sky filled with large white clouds. The camera is positioned below her waist and angled upward, creating a strong wide-angle perspective. She looks down at the lens with a calm, detached, and relaxed expression, her lips slightly parted in a natural way, without an intentional smile. She has striking, refined beauty that effortlessly draws attention. Her hair is long and {argument name="hair color" default="light blonde"}, with thick bangs covering her forehead. A few loose strands are blown by the wind, catching subtle highlights in the sunlight. She has large double eyelids, a well-defined nose bridge, and slightly glossy lips. She is wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="light gray ribbed knit long-sleeve top"}, with one hand lifting the hem upward. The fabric forms realistic diagonal folds and layered bunching across the chest. The visual focus is on the close-up view of her abdomen, waistline, and the skin below the ribcage, while the lower edge of the chest is partially obscured by the clothing and camera angle. Her skin has a light warm tone, with peach-pink and golden highlights under strong natural sunlight. Visible details include realistic pores, a slight sheen of sweat, subtle navel detail, and soft natural skin texture, giving the impression of sun-warmed skin with a faintly moist surface. The edge of the clothing and the white earphone cable cast thin, hard-edged shadows across her abdomen. White wired earphones hang down from her ears, forming a large curved line in the foreground, with part of the cable passing across the abdominal area. Small silver earrings are also visible. The background contains only a bright blue sky, white clouds, thin cloud streaks, and a few distant dark specks, creating the feeling of a casual snapshot taken outdoors on a summer afternoon. The photography style is raw smartphone photography, a low-angle sky selfie, in a vertical 3:4 composition, shot with a smartphone wide-angle lens and a relatively deep depth of field, keeping the subject, hand, cable, and sky all mostly in clear focus.

content:
Convert the subject in this image into a stylized 3D caricature portrait with {argument name="head shape" default="an elongated rectangular head"}, {argument name="facial feature" default="oversized nose"}, and pristine studio lighting. Use a sculpted, high-end 3D CGI character treatment with strong identity preservation, while amplifying the facial geometry into a bold editorial caricature without changing the subject’s existing hair.

CHARACTER:
Build the subject as a tall, narrow caricature bust with a stretched rectangular skull, compressed cheek planes, and a dominant forward-projecting nose that anchors the face. Preserve the subject’s recognizable hair volume by translating it into clean, sculpted strands. Keep the clothing simplified, modern, and rendered as a refined secondary form that supports the face.

FACE & ANATOMY:
Use a severe angular facial construction with planar transitions, heavy brows, deep-set eyes, and a long tapered lower face. Keep the expression serious and slightly weary, with a rigid jaw rhythm and exaggerated vertical proportions. The body should remain secondary and understated, with the head as the primary silhouette.

**Passport Photo Background:** Use a solid blue background (the standard official passport photo color for Indonesian marriage books for certain even/odd birth years).
**Clothing:** Both subjects in the photo wear formal and neat white collared shirts.
**Male Subject (Left Photo):** Make his face and hair 100% similar to the given reference.
He poses as if talking into a white paper cup, with a cheerful laughing expression.
**Female Subject (Right Photo):** Make her face and hair 100% similar to the given reference.
She poses as if holding a white paper cup to her ear, listening. Her expression is funny with a wide smile and a slightly stuck-out tongue.
**Interactive Prop:** There is a white string coming out from under the male's paper cup and connecting to the female's paper cup. Because the two photos are placed next to each other, this prop creates the illusion of a "string phone" connecting the two photos.
title: Portrait Master Object: String Phone Passport Photos
description: A prompt for Nano Banana 2 to create a 'Portrait Master Object' image showing two passport-sized photo prints held by fingers, where the subjects in the photos are connected by a string phone illusion, requiring reference images for the faces.

content:
Day and night split portrait:

A hyper-realistic 8K photo of a young woman's portrait, with her face split vertically and sharply down the center of her nose, representing two different times of day. The LEFT HALF of her face is illuminated by warm, golden afternoon daylight, with sun-kissed skin and eye reflections of the sun and clouds. Her hair shows warm highlights, and she wears a white linen shirt on the left shoulder. The background behind the left side features a bright blue sky, a sunflower, green leaves, and a butterfly near her left ear. The RIGHT HALF of her face is bathed in cool, blue moonlight, with a cool-toned, slightly silvery complexion, and eye reflections of moonlight and stars. Her hair shows cool blue highlights, and she wears a dark velvet dress visible on the right shoulder. The background on the right shows a dark night sky with visible stars, a crescent moon, fireflies glowing, and a moth near her right ear. The transition between the two halves is abrupt and sharp, with a perfect vertical dividing line running through the center of the nose bridge, creating a stunning and impossible juxtaposition of day and night. The woman maintains a calm, direct gaze with the same expression on both halves. The lighting setup is distinctly different on each side, with warm 3200K daylight from the left and cool 7000K moonlight from the right, with no bleed. The image is captured on an 85mm f/1.8 lens as a head-and-shoulders close-up at direct eye-level angle, with a shallow depth of field, rendering a photorealistic, clean, and beautiful image with share-worthy qualities.
title: Day and Night Split Portrait Prompt for Nano Banana Pro
description: A highly detailed prompt for generating a hyper-realistic 8K portrait using Nano Banana Pro, featuring a vertical split down the center of the face. The left side represents day (warm golden light, blue sky, sunflower) and the right side represents night (cool blue moonlight, dark sky, stars, fireflies). The prompt specifies camera settings (85mm f/1.8, close-up) and distinct lighting temperatures (3200K vs 7000K) for a sharp juxtaposition.

content:
Create an 8k high-detail stylized digital portrait illustration of a person with a slightly happy, gently uplifted expression, maintaining realistic facial structure and natural imperfections, captured at an eye-level camera angle with the subject looking directly into the camera.
Use the uploaded image as the primary identity reference.
Face Accuracy (Critical)
Match the face with 100% identity accuracy. Preserve exact facial structure, bone anatomy, grooming details, jawline, cheekbones, and forehead proportions.
Subject & Expression:
The person has natural eyes with visible iris details. His face shows noticeable forehead lines. His expression feels subtly warm and introspective, with a faint, relaxed softness around the eyes and a very slight, natural hint of a smile — not exaggerated, just a mild uplift in mood while preserving realism.
Hair:
Natural-length, natural colour hair, slightly naturally messy, with textured strands highlighted in lighter colour tones to add depth and volume.
Outfit:
He wears a dark green and brown plaid (tartan) jacket with a loose, painterly pattern. Underneath is a muted beige/tan button-down shirt with a neatly tucked collar. The clothing should feel grounded, simple, and slightly worn.
Composition & Framing (IMPORTANT):
Head-and-shoulders portrait only (no full body)
Subject perfectly centered in the frame
Shoulders must NOT touch the edges — maintain clean breathing space
Bottom of the artwork should fade into a soft, rough, painterly edge (subtle cut-out feel)
Negative space below the portrait to draw focus upward to the face
Background:
Minimal cream background. Behind the head, place a bold orange square with slightly rough, painterly edges to create contrast and a halo-like framing effect.
Lighting:
Soft directional lighting from the upper left, creating gentle highlights on the forehead, nose bridge, and cheek, with subtle shadows on the opposite side to enhance facial structure and depth.
Style & Rendering:
Semi-realistic illustration blending editorial portrait art and graphic novel style
Strong sketch-like linework with expressive strokes
Visible textured brushwork and painterly shading
Dry brush effects, especially around the shoulders, where the image softly dissolves
Natural skin texture with varied tones (subtle reds, neutral hues, faint bluish undertones for stubble effect)
No beautification — preserve raw realism and imperfections
Quality Tags:
ultra-detailed, 8k high resolution, sharp focus, textured brush strokes, cinematic portrait, centered composition, premium illustration style
Aspect ratio 4:5

Proportions, skin tone, hairstyle, and all recognizable features. Do not alter or stylize the real face.
Composition & Framing:

Full-body vertical shot with a clean, centered layout. The real subject stands on the right, and the caricature stands on the left at approximately 50–60% of the real subject’s height. The real subject casually rests one elbow on the caricature’s oversized head, creating a natural, playful interaction.
Real Subject (Photographic):

Ultra-realistic rendering with natural skin texture and fine detail. Expression is warm, relaxed, and confident.
Pose & Style (IMPORTANT):

The subject stands in a slightly cool, stylish posture — relaxed stance with subtle asymmetry (one leg slightly forward or weight shifted), shoulders loose, not stiff. The hand resting on the caricature should feel effortless and natural.
Clothing (Match Reference):

{argument name="clothing" default="Gray crewneck sweater (fine knit texture, ribbed cuffs/hem), classic blue jeans (straight fit), and clean white sneakers"}. Keep textures realistic and clearly visible.
3D Caricature (Stylized Version):

Pixar/Disney-inspired 3D style with exaggerated proportions — large expressive head and smaller body. The height should be noticeably shorter, around the real subject's waist level.
Facial features must remain recognizable but enhanced — larger eyes, softer forms, slightly amplified smile.
Emotion & Body Movement (IMPORTANT):

Expression is more playful and animated than the real subject

Eyes brighter and more expressive, smile slightly exaggerated
Body posture must NOT be stiff — use a natural, lively stance

Add subtle movement according to the real subject's personality

Pose should feel like a living, animated character, not a rigid figurine
Clothing:

Exact 1:1 stylized recreation of the real subject’s outfit with soft 3D textures.
Lighting & Environment:

Soft, diffused studio lighting from the upper-left, creating smooth highlights and gentle shadows. Clean light-gray gradient seamless background(lighter in the inner areas).
Output Style:

Ultra-clean, cinematic, high-detail render with strong contrast between realistic human and stylized 3D character. Both subjects grounded with soft natural shadows.

content:
(9:16) Raw high-fidelity photo, eye-level, medium-wide environmental portrait, iPhone 17 Pro sim, 35mm, f/2.8, natural bokeh, authentic grain.

Framing: Subject ~60% frame height, camera ~2m, outdoor terrace, wide horizon sky (top ~40%), glass railings, minimal foreground clutter.

Identity Lock: Preserve ALL facial features (structure, skin, hair, marks).
Enhancement: Natural skin clarity (pores visible), even tone, soft glow, subtle light-based contour, refined highlights (eyes/lips/cheekbones), natural lashes/brows/teeth, salon hair.
Bio-Fidelity: Micro-pores, fine vellus hair, natural skin hydration.
Expression: Warm/confident, soft closed-lip smile, direct eye contact over right shoulder, head turned ~80° back.

Hair: Same color/texture, long, sleek, straight, down back framing right shoulder, soft daylight highlights.
Makeup: Natural daytime (soft base, subtle eyes, neutral matte lip).

Accessories: None.

Outfit: White rib-knit cropped sweater (tight fit) + high-waisted pleated plaid micro-skirt (brown/beige/white), sharp pleats, realistic fabric tension, defined S-curve.

Pose: Torso facing away (~90°), head turned back (~80°), right hand lightly lifting skirt hem, realistic finger/textile interaction.

Mood/Color: Warm, confident travel aesthetic; palette (white, coffee-brown, beige, sky blue), 5500K daylight, medium-high contrast.

Environment: Outdoor terrace, diffused sunlight (upper-right), glass railings + metal posts, distant hills + urban skyline, bright sky w/ soft clouds, stone/concrete detail, background softly blurred (f/2.8).

content: Transform the subjects into a cute anime chibi characters rendered as a clean 3D model, while preserving the subject's original race, ethnicity, skin tone, and recognizable facial likeness, including hairstyle, hair color, and clothing colors. The character must remain clearly the same person with the same skin tone and ethnic appearance as the original input, translated into a chibi form. The character should have classic chibi proportions: a very large head, small torso, simplified cute facial features, and large expressive anime-style eyes. Translate the subject's facial features into a chibi style while keeping their recognizable likeness. Frame the character from the torso up, with the camera slightly closer and cropped in, so the upper body and head fill most of the frame. The character should be looking directly into the camera, with an energetic and expressive anime-style pose. Use a slightly dynamic camera angle, such as a subtle tilt or off-axis perspective, similar to modern anime promotional artwork. The camera can be slightly lower than the character's face, creating a playful upward Tr angle that makes the character feel lively and engaging. Render the character as a high-quality glossy 3D anime-style model, similar to a polished Blender render or premium collectible figure. The materials should be smooth, reflective, and toy-like, with strong highlights, soft reflections, and shiny surfaces. The overall look should clearly resemble a 3D rendered character, not a flat 2D illustration. Use bright anime-style shading with vibrant but polished colors, giving the character a premium anime aesthetic. Place the character in front of a colorful gradient background. Behind the character, include a small number of large, translucent decorative shapes such as bubbles, stars, or rounded forms. These shapes should appear semi-transparent, glossy, and subtle, similar to clear acrylic or glass, softly floating in the background without drawing attention away from the character. The background elements should remain light, minimal, and softly visible, acting as stylish accents rather than prominent objects. The final image should look like a dynamic, glossy 3D chibi character render, with polished materials, vibrant colors, and a premium collectible aesthetic,while clearly maintaining the subject's original race, skin tone, and recognizable identity.

content:
A highly realistic smartphone selfie photo of a Caucasian woman in her mid-20s, captured in a vertical 4:5 aspect ratio. The camera is held at a slightly high angle with an arm-extended perspective, using a wide-angle smartphone lens (around 24–28mm). The framing shows her from head to mid-torso, with sharp focus on her face and a slightly softer background.

She has fair-light skin with warm-neutral undertones, smooth natural texture, and a subtle glow from soft daylight. Her cheeks have a gentle pink flush. Her face is oval-shaped with a soft jawline, medium forehead, slightly full cheeks, and a rounded chin.

Her eyes are light green with hints of hazel, almond-shaped, with long defined lashes and mascara. Her eyebrows are light brown, medium thickness, softly arched, and well-groomed. She has a straight nose with a slightly rounded tip, proportional in size. Her lips are full (especially the lower lip), natural pink in color, with a slightly glossy hydrated look. She is smiling naturally with visible straight white teeth, giving a friendly, confident, relaxed expression, with slightly squinting eyes due to the smile.

Her hair is shoulder-length, dark blonde with lighter blonde highlights (balayage), styled in soft waves with a center part, naturally framing her face.

She has a slim to average build, visible from head to mid-torso, with a relaxed posture slightly angled toward the camera.

She is wearing a fitted white short-sleeve t-shirt made of soft cotton, slightly stretchy, tightly fitted. The shirt has bold red block serif text in all caps on the chest reading: “YES THEY ARE REAL”. She also wears a thin gold chain necklace with a small subtle pendant.

The lighting is natural daylight coming from the front-left, soft and diffused, creating even illumination on her face with gentle shadows and natural highlights.

The background is an indoor home setting, likely a kitchen/living area. Visible elements include a light-colored kitchen counter, white modern bar stools, a dark refrigerator (black or stainless steel) with small items or magnets attached, muted green/gray walls, light brown wooden door trim, and medium warm brown wooden flooring. The background has moderate depth and is slightly blurred.

The overall color palette includes white, red, natural skin tones, green-gray walls, wood browns, and dark appliance tones. The image style is highly realistic with minimal editing, high clarity, low noise, and natural contrast.

content:
I. Subject Setting
1 Character Description: Based on the reference image, a young woman with delicate features, a small and soft face shape, overall makeup referencing the style of a Korean actress. The image should present a natural and playful feeling of a casual late-night bedroom selfie.
2 Age Status: Young adult.

II. Expression and Face
1 Eye State: Soft and focused eyes, with a slight smile, gentle, calm, slightly playful temperament, gaze directed towards the phone screen and lens area.
2 Mouth State: Mouth closed, with a slight arc of a smile, feeling sweet yet restrained, relaxed and natural.
3 Overall Expression: Presenting an intimate, soft, and slightly playful expression, with a subtle and attractive temperament.
4 Facial Retention: Face remains small and natural, cheeks have a soft fleshy feel, jawline is soft, retaining natural asymmetry and realistic proportions.
5 Makeup Characteristics: Korean actress-style makeup, clear and clean base makeup, smooth skin texture, straight and soft eyebrows, light brown eyeliner, natural eyelashes, slight aegyo-sal (under-eye bags), soft blush, delicate nose highlight, low-saturation rose glossy lip color.

III. Hairstyle Setting
1 Hair Color: Deep black.
2 Hair State: Long hair naturally draped, with soft layers and light, airy bangs covering the forehead.
3 Hair Effect: Smooth hair texture, slightly messy, naturally falling around the cheeks and pillow.

IV. Body and Skin Texture
1 Body Characteristics: Slender, compact figure, soft and feminine temperament.
2 Waist State: Waist is slender, but mostly obscured by the curled posture.
3 Chest State: Minimal expression, mostly covered by the posture and phone position.
4 Leg State: The legs are the main subject of the picture, significantly affected by the close-up phone perspective. One knee is close to the lens, and the feet are raised upwards, forming an asymmetrical yet playful arrangement.
5 Exposed Areas: Face, arms, thighs, knees, calves, feet.
6 Skin Tone Characteristics: Fair skin tone, with a soft neutral-to-warm undertone.
7 Skin Texture: Smooth skin, realistically tactile, appearing soft under the flash, avoid plastic smoothing, retain realistic skin details.
8 Light Effect: Direct flash causes bright highlights on the knees, feet, cheeks, and forehead, while shadows naturally transition to the darker areas of the room.

V. Pose and Composition Action
1 Basic Pose: The person is lying on the bed against the wall, upper body slightly propped up, holding a phone in one hand, close to the face.
2 Core Posture: Overall is a natural, curled, casual lying posture.
3 Action Feeling: Legs are raised high, forming a deliberately unbalanced but playful composition, like a casual private snapshot.

VI. Clothing and Accessories
1 Top Setting: Simple black home wear top or dress, black color, minimalist and form-fitting style, mostly obscured due to posture and legs.
2 Top Function: Visual focus is concentrated on the face, legs, and skin illuminated by the flash.
3 Bottom Setting: Bottoms are not clearly visible, dark color or obscured, mostly covered by body posture, bedding, and framing.
4 Phone Setting: Light gold phone, rear flash directly hitting the lens, forming obvious starburst flares.
5 Other Accessories: Beige ribbed knit leg warmers, loosely piled around the calves and ankles.

VII. Shooting Method
1 Overall Style: Realistic phone snapshot texture, close to daily social media photos, with a natural bedroom selfie atmosphere.
2 Camera Angle: Low angle, close to the bed surface, using a wide-angle phone perspective.
3 Image Type: Vertical composition, full-body casual selfie, foreground bedding takes up a significant proportion, exaggerated leg perspective.
4 Aspect Ratio: Vertical long aspect ratio.
5 Image Texture: Phone imaging details are clear, with slight natural noise, flash has realistic bloom, skin is clean but not overly retouched.
6 Lighting Setting: Main light source is direct front flash from the phone, a hard front light. The room is generally dark, and shadows decay quickly.
7 Focus Performance: The phone's depth of field is relatively deep, and most areas of the subject are clearly readable.

VIII. Background Environment
1 Scene Location: A corner of a quiet bedroom at night.
2 Wall Color: Pure, low-saturation gray wall.
3 Background Elements: Foreground has checkered quilt and messy bedding, dark pillow behind the person, white door edge on the left, wooden drawer cabinet on the right.
4 Environment Atmosphere: Private, quiet, slightly lived-in, not overly tidy.
5 Background Lighting: The environment itself is dark, mostly suppressed by the phone flash.

IX. Overall Atmosphere
1 Temperament Keywords: Soft, playful, low-key, unintentional.
2 Emotional State: Intimacy in the deep night, with a slight, gentle smile.
3 Aesthetic Direction: Korean female celebrity aesthetic combined with a realistic bedroom snapshot feel.
4 Realism Requirements: Retain imperfect composition, messy bedding, wide-angle distortion, and harshness of the flash, making the image look more like a real photo rather than a deliberate pose.
5 Atmosphere Expression: Like the room has quieted down, captured in a moment of pause before sleep, with only the phone flash breaking the darkness.
6 Image Story: Not a studio shoot, not a deliberate performance, but capturing a brief and beautiful moment on the bed, where comfort, youth, and natural charm accidentally bring out a cinematic feel.
7 Image Feeling: Must be casual enough to seem real, yet beautiful enough to maintain a sense of distance.
title: Late Night Bedroom Selfie AI Photo Series
description: A highly detailed and comprehensive prompt for generating a realistic, late-night bedroom selfie using Nano Banana 2. The prompt specifies character appearance (Korean actress style), expression (soft, playful), pose (reclining with raised legs), lighting (direct phone flash), and texture (natural noise, no plastic smoothing) to achieve an authentic, candid snapshot aesthetic.

content:
A candid, realistic mirror selfie photograph taken in a brightly lit bedroom during daytime. The image captures a young adult woman from the waist up looking directly at her reflection while taking the photo with her phone. The mood is casual and confident.

She has long blonde hair with a natural wavy texture, parted slightly to the left and falling over her shoulders. She has fair skin with natural texture and a subtle flush on the cheeks. Her blue-green eyes look directly at the camera with a natural expression. She has naturally shaped filled blonde eyebrows, a straight well-proportioned nose, and full naturally pink lips with a subtle clear gloss or balm. Her facial expression is confident and neutral. She is making a thumbs-up gesture with her right hand.

She is standing slightly angled toward the mirror, holding her phone in her left hand to take the selfie, while her right arm is raised with the thumb extended in a thumbs-up gesture.

She is wearing a pastel yellow strapless bandeau-style tube top made of soft stretchy cotton fabric. She is wearing light beige or khaki denim jeans that are loose, unbuttoned and slightly unzipped at the waist. A plain white thong waistband is clearly visible above the unbuttoned jeans.

She is holding an iPhone with three camera lenses in a pink and white gingham plaid patterned phone case. She is wearing a delicate gold chain necklace with a small pendant, layered bracelets on her left wrist including a red beaded bracelet and other small charm bracelets, small stud earrings, and short fingernails with a light pink gel manicure.

The mirror reflection shows a well-lit bedroom. On the left side a white wardrobe cabinet is partially visible. In the background there is a bed with white linens and a pale pink throw blanket. Behind the bed is a window with partially closed white horizontal blinds. On the windowsill there are small decorative items including a small pink flower pot and some seashells. A white radiator is visible below the window. The flooring is light wood laminate. The edge of a white framed mirror is visible on the left side of the image.

Photography style: candid mirror selfie, natural daylight from the window evenly lighting the room, sharp focus on the subject’s face and reflection, medium close-up composition, vertical 4:5 aspect ratio, realistic unaltered phone camera aesthetic with natural film grain.

Hands rest lightly on the waist/hips with fingers spread across the ribs. Multiple stacked silver rings on the right hand. Long almond-shaped acrylic nails painted light pink/nude.

(9:16) Raw high-fidelity mirror selfie photo, eye-level, medium-wide shot. Simulated iPhone 17 Pro, 24mm lens, f/2.8, natural optical background bokeh, subtle digital grain.

Framing
Subject centered, kneeling on a bed, occupying ~60% of frame height. Rumpled white bedding fills lower frame; neutral grey wall upper frame. Camera ~1m from mirror (arm’s length).

Identity
Identity Lock: inherit all facial features, skin tone, and hair from the provided selfie. Maintain natural skin texture (pores, fine facial hair, realistic skin physics). Subtle photogenic enhancement: even skin tone, soft jaw contour, gentle cheek highlight, bright natural eyes with catchlights, groomed brows, defined lashes, clean natural teeth.

Expression: relaxed and pensive. Eyes looking at phone screen (~15° off-camera left). Lips closed with soft neutral pout. Brows relaxed.

Same color and texture as selfie. Long straight hair with messy “bedhead” volume, strands falling over the right shoulder. Soft window light highlights.

Makeup
Winged black eyeliner, light natural foundation, soft rose lip gloss.

Accessories
Light pink smartphone in right hand with black charging cable. Thin black elastic on right wrist. Single white wireless earbud in left ear.

Outfit
Oversized optic-white cotton crew-neck t-shirt, mid-thigh length. Realistic heavyweight fabric wrinkles and drape. Kneeling posture creates natural bunching around waist and hips. Silhouette subtly visible through fabric.

Pose
Kneeling upright on bed, knees together. Torso facing mirror. Head slightly tilted down toward phone. Right hand holding phone, left hand resting behind on mattress.

Mood & Color
Cozy, dreamy mood. Palette: white, slate grey, soft pink, cool daylight blue.

Lighting
Mid-morning window light from the left (~6000K). Soft diffused light wrapping face and body, moderate-high contrast with gentle shadows to the right.

Environment
Bedroom scene: rumpled white duvet and pillows with visible texture. On bed behind subject: pink plush cat-ear headband and pink handheld gaming console. Neutral grey wall background. Small white vanity with pink items partially visible on far left.

She is wearing a light pink button-up cardigan over a light grey ribbed knit bralette or top featuring a subtle cut-out and delicate strappy detail at the chest. Her head is slightly tilted to her right (viewer's left), and her gaze is soft and direct, with subtle, natural-looking hazel contact lenses that blend with the natural eye color, adding warmth and depth. Her expression is serene and inviting, with a gentle, soft smile causing a slight micro-tightening at the outer corners of her eyes. content:
(9:16) Raw high-fidelity photo, high-angle medium shot. iPhone 17 Pro simulation, 24mm wide-angle, f/2.8, sharp subject focus, authentic digital grain.

Scene: Subject fills ~65% of frame in crouching/kneeling pose. Upper 40% shows pitch-black night sky and dark marina water; lower 20% textured stone tile floor. Camera ~1.5m above subject angled downward.

Identity Lock: Inherit ALL facial features from the provided selfie (face shape, bone structure, eyes, nose, lips, skin tone, hair).

Photogenic Enhancements: Natural skin clarity with preserved texture, even tone, subtle luminosity, refined jawline shadows, gentle nasal highlight, soft cheekbone highlights, enhanced iris catchlights, natural lash separation, groomed brows, pearl-white teeth, salon-finish hair with controlled flyaways. Bio-fidelity with micro-pores, hydrated T-zone, faint vellus hair.

Expression: Pensive neutral look. Gaze ~45° to mid-right off-camera. Slightly parted lips, relaxed brows, head tilted slightly right.

Hair: Inherit color/texture from selfie. Long sleek straight hair with center part falling behind shoulders. Strong flash highlights creating strand separation.

Makeup: Glossy pink lips, clean foundation, winged black eyeliner, defined lashes, soft blush.

Accessories: Thin gold chain necklace with small heart pendant, crystal-studded silver strap across left shoulder, gold bracelets/watch on left wrist.

Outfit: Light grey rib-knit off-shoulder mini dress with long sleeves. White floral-lace tights. Dark slate-grey suede thigh-high boots. Realistic fabric tension and elbow/waist bunching; detailed lace skin interaction. Defined S-curve silhouette with enhanced waist–hip and leg geometry.

Pose: Torso and hips angled ~45° right. Head turned further right, looking off-camera. Low crouch on stone floor, arms relaxed forward with natural finger articulation.

Mood: Moody urban nighttime aesthetic. Palette: slate grey, optic white, onyx black, pale gold.

Lighting: Harsh direct flash (~6500K) from camera, bright skin highlights and deep shadows. High-contrast flash photography look.

Environment: Night marina/waterfront — dark water with vertical dock light reflections, blurred white yacht mid-left, large textured grey stone tiles underfoot. Sharp subject shadows anchor to the ground.

The subject wears delicate, multi-layered pink beaded necklaces with various charms including hearts and small bows, and elegant pearl and gold stud earrings. [AESTHETIC]: A hyper-realistic, ultra-sharp photograph taken on a modern smartphone, characterized by its digital clarity, specifically a Google Pixel 8. The entire scene is in sharp focus, showcasing realistic digital textures with discernible skin pores and crisp details on accessories. Create a video-style shot facing forward. The camera is fixed at face height and positioned directly in front of the subject. The subject is indicated to be sitting based on their posture and composition.

The composition is simple and stable, with no dramatic angles or noticeable camera movements. Lighting is realistic, considering a [Add realistic lighting considering UGC style shots]. The face is clearly visible.

The subject's expression is calm and relaxed, with a natural, subtle smile. It looks as if she is about to start talking to the camera for a vlog. The image quality reflects a high-quality video shot indoors at night, with no filters, beautification effects, or artificial sharpening applied.

The space feels personal. The bokeh is due to the camera's limitations, not artificial depth-of-field effects. The overall atmosphere is warm, bright, and intimate, reminiscent of a real vlog moment just before the subject begins to speak.

The woman's dialogue is: "Today's fashion highlight is [Add fashion features]!" She speaks in a gentle tone while touching her clothes. She smiles at the end.

content:
I. Composition & Spatial Layout
1.Framing & Scale: The subject occupies approximately 60–70% of the frame height. Leave at least 30% of the frame height as empty space above the head. Both left and right sides retain clearly visible empty wall space.
2.Visual Focus: A minimal, uncluttered background designed to strongly emphasize facial structure, eye expression, and skin quality.

II. Lighting & Shadow Style
1.Key Light: Intense natural daylight, side-backlit with a slight reverse angle, cool-toned, producing extreme high-contrast separation between highlights and shadows.
2.Light Characteristics: Dense, hard-edged leaf-shadow patterns projected across the wall and the subject’s body and face. Shadow edges are razor-sharp with extremely narrow penumbra.
3.Highlight Control: Large areas of the background are deliberately overexposed while retaining faint surface texture, creating a glowing, almost blinding spatial atmosphere.

III. Subject Appearance (Face & Hair — Reference Applied)
1.Facial Structure:
A young Japanese woman in her 20s with a refined V-shaped face, sharp jawline, and high-definition facial contours. Overall facial balance is elegant yet striking, with high visual impact.
2.Skin Quality:
Porcelain-toned Japanese skin with a cool undertone. Ultra-smooth, luminous texture enhanced by strong contrast lighting while retaining realistic skin detail.
3.Eyes & Expression:
・Large, sharp fox-shaped eyes
・Confident gaze directed straight into the camera
・Expression carries a cool, playful, slightly teasing energy
・K-pop idol–inspired eyeliner with clearly emphasized aegyosal
・Overall expression is controlled, calm, and subtly provocative rather than smiling
4.Mouth:
Relaxed lips with a subtle, effortless smirk. Glossy gradient lips with a refined sheen, never exaggerated.
5.Hair Style:
Long, sleek, straight black hair reaching the waist, with perfectly straight, neatly trimmed Japanese bangs. Hair finish is glossy, clean, and fashion-forward, moving minimally in the light.
6.Makeup Style:
High-contrast K-pop idol–inspired makeup. Clean base, sculpted facial structure, cool-toned color balance, no warm or heavy blush.
7.Accessories (Minimal):
・Small gold pendant necklace
・Small gold hoop earrings
・Minimalist tattoo on the left inner forearm

IV. Clothing
・Cropped pure-white bandeau-style tube top
・Body-hugging but not tight, exposing the waist
・Fabric remains clean and structured, no wrinkles distracting from silhouette

FACE LOCK — HIGHEST PRIORITY Use the uploaded reference image as the only and exclusive facial identity source. Preserve the face exactly 1:1 with zero deviation: same identity same facial structure and proportions same skin tone same eyes, brows, nose, lips, jawline same hairline and facial hair No reinterpretation, no beautification, no regeneration, no face drift. Facial accuracy overrides lighting, pose, motion blur, and realism. POSE & BODY (LOCKED — EXACT) The subject is standing at the top landing / exit of an indoor escalator inside a modern shopping mall. Leaning against a glass railing with a wooden hand rest. Right elbow resting on the wooden railing Right hand touching the back of the head near the neck Head tilted downward Chin slightly tucked Face mostly hidden by falling hair Eyes looking toward the floor, not at the camera Shoulders slightly slouched Torso leaning subtly forward Legs relaxed, lightly crossed at the ankles The posture feels tired, introspective, accidental — not posed. OUTFIT (LOCKED — EXACT) Oversized off-white / cream T-shirt loose fit short sleeves very small, subtle chest text (not bold, not decorative) Light-wash baggy-fit jeans loose through the legs natural folds and creases Black-and-white low-top sneakers Black backpack worn on one shoulder, hanging naturally down the back single strap visible No jewelry. No accessories. No sunglasses. HAIR & SKIN Medium-length black hair Naturally messy, textured, lived-in Hair falling forward, partially covering the face Expression calm and unreadable Real skin texture with visible pores No smoothing, no beautification BACKGROUND (LOCKED) Modern shopping mall interior Glass railing with vertical metal supports Wooden handrail on top of the glass Escalator ending immediately beside the subject black escalator belt visible Clean white walls Minimal architectural design Neutral tiled flooring Open mall space visible behind the glass Quiet, spacious, real environment No decorative staging, no crowd emphasis LIGHTING (LOCKED) Soft indoor mall lighting Even illumination No flash No dramatic shadows Natural reflections on glass and metal Neutral white balance CAMERA & FRAMING Handheld smartphone photo Eye-level framing Full body visible Slight real-world imperfection No portrait mode No background blur No cinematic depth Natural sharpness with mild softness OVERALL FEEL A real, unplanned moment captured while pausing near an escalator. Quiet Gen-Z aesthetic. Minimal, human, Pinterest-worthy without trying. Believable and unstaged. NEGATIVE PROMPT studio lighting, cinematic grading, fashion posing, beauty filter, smooth skin, AI look, CGI, portrait blur, dramatic lighting, exaggerated expressions, oversharpening.

content:
A "gritty" (raw/grainy) mirror selfie taken with an iPhone late at night in a female dormitory. The woman is captured through the reflection, casually holding the phone at chest height, partially obscuring her face. The mirror is slightly dirty, with smudges and dust residue that add texture and realism.

She is sitting on the edge of her bed, slightly leaning forward.

Her posture is relaxed and natural (unposed): one leg bent, the other hanging naturally, shoulders loose, and the body slightly angled due to the mirror's perspective. Head subtly tilted to the viewer's right, the face dominates almost the entire frame, shoulders rounded forward, and the body leaning slightly towards the camera to achieve that classic cozy night-time selfie compression.

The right hand (viewer's left side) is raised directly in front of the face, at chin or mouth level, with the palm clearly facing the camera, performing a prominent peace sign / V-sign gesture:

The index and middle fingers are fully extended and well separated (an angle of ~60–70° between them).

The ring and pinky fingers are fully bent, tightly pressed, and held flat by the thumb.

The thumb firmly anchors the bent fingers, being clearly visible as it presses against them.

The fingers point slightly upwards and forwards (not perfectly vertical, with a soft natural tilt).

Hand positioned centrally, very close to the face; the fingertips are approximately at the level of the lips or nose, creating a strong foreground element.

The left hand is not visible, completely out of frame.

Relaxed and casual torso posture: shoulders slightly hunched forward, neck gently stretched towards the lens, the typical hunched pose of a low-light bedroom selfie.

Atmosphere: intimate, playful, low-light night atmosphere, with a strong emphasis on the bold hand gesture in the center of the frame, just in front of the face.

She wears an elegant {argument name="top garment" default="fitted black crop-top"} with a sharp, refined silhouette, a {argument name="bottom garment" default="black leather mini-skirt"} and {argument name="footwear" default="white sneakers"}. She has a wild wavy hairstyle. The high fashion contrasts effortlessly with the relaxed atmosphere of the room.

The lighting comes solely from the bedroom ceiling lamp, raw and imperfect: direct phone flash reflected in the mirror, blown-out highlights on the skin and fabric, harsh shadows, uneven exposure, visible grain, slight motion blur, flash flares, and reflections within reflections.

Mid Walk — natural mid-step candid pose. Style: editorial fashion photography, cinematic, high-end. content:
(9:16). Portrait orientation. Raw high-fidelity photograph, iPhone 17 Pro simulation, 24mm wide-angle focal length, f/2.4 aperture for total structural depth, authentic digital grain, mirror-selfie perspective.

[Subject & Identity Locking]

Identity Lock: Absolute inheritance of all facial geometry, epidermal characteristics, ocular structure, and natural hair color/texture directly from Reference Image A. The AI must perform a 1:1 pixel-mapping of the subject's identity from Image A into the target scene.
Bio-Fidelity: Epidermal physics featuring visible micro-pores, fine vellus hair along the jawline, and satin-finish hydration on the T-zone, maintaining the exact skin-tone profile inherited from Image A.
Expression Sync: Expression Lock—replicate the mirror-selfie gaze through the lens, specific pouty lip tension, and soft tension of the facial muscles from Reference Image B.
[Outfit & Physicality] (CASE B - Standard Fashion)

Technical Description: High-tensile rib-knit mini-dress in {argument name="dress color" default="deep chocolate brown"} with a mock-neck collar and short sleeves. Hemline at upper-thigh geometry.
Textile Architecture: Visible vertical ribbing texture; material-to-skin tension showing realistic bunching at the waist. Paired with checkered-pattern comfort slides.
Anatomical Volume: Hyper-defined S-curve silhouette; maximum anatomical emphasis on the waist-to-hip ratio and leg definition; apply the 20% over-description rule for "Hyper-defined hourglass geometry" to counteract model bias.
Accessories: Transparent clear-frame optical glasses; long square-tip manicured nails; a small luxury monogram-texture leather handbag held in the left hand. Blue-cased smartphone held for the selfie.
[Pose & Interaction]

Geometry: Full-body standing mirror selfie pose. Right arm raised for the phone; left arm at the side holding the handbag. Subject is centered with a slight hip-pop to emphasize the silhouette.
Articulation: Precise finger-joint articulation on the smartphone and the bag handle; realistic skeletal alignment of the shoulders and neck.
[Environment & Lighting]

Atmosphere: Casual domestic interior apartment setting; soft diffused 4000K neutral-warm overhead lighting.
Background Integrity: Pixel-perfect inventory of wood-plank flooring; white interior doors (one featuring a {argument name="sticker detail" default="Hello Kitty sticker"}); a kitchen breakfast bar with a dark wooden bar stool; a pink handbag hanging in the mid-ground; and miscellaneous household items on the counter.
Shadow Ray-Tracing: Natural ambient occlusion in the garment folds; soft shadows cast by the subject onto the floor; realistic mirror-plane reflection with accurate depth and light-bounce from the background elements.

content:
Use the attached face photo as is to create a vertical 3-frame low-res webcam collage.

Absolute rules regarding the face:

Do not alter the face at all

Maintain the exact proportions of features, face shape, eye size, nose, mouth, and jawline

Do not make the person look younger or overly cute

Do not change the gender of the person in the input photo

Do not generate new people (opposite/same sex)

Hairstyle:

Maintain the original hairstyle

Do not change the length, parting, or curl

Only render it in a naturally slightly messy, rough state

Shooting Tone & Color (Reference Reflection):

Express the colors identically to the attached reference photo

Background:

Japanese wooden Ryokan.

Minimize background details

Maintain a dark and blurry state

Clothing Rules (Based on Input Photo):

If the input photo is female → Black {argument name="female attire" default="Yukata"} with red floral patterns in all frames

If the input photo is male → Black silk dress shirt with a {argument name="male attire" default="red tie"} in all frames

1st Frame:

Sad expression like a protagonist in a sad movie

Finger near the mouth

2nd Frame:

Head slightly turned to the side

Show the beautiful profile

Casual selfie feel, no excessive posing

3rd Frame:

Warm and beautiful smile

Hands clasped together, resting the chin on them

Emotion is calm and dreamy atmosphere

Important Additional Instructions:

Use only the one person in the input photo

Do not change gender, face, or atmosphere

Style changes should only be applied to lighting, color, noise, and effects

Use the same face consistently across all frames

Absolute rules regarding effects:

Apply the same cinesteel 800T film style and cinematic light effects in all frames.

Absolute rules regarding effects:

Apply the same red lighting effect on one side and a tasteful motion blur effect from left to right in all frames.

It specifies background (Japanese Ryokan), clothing (Yukata or Silk Shirt based on gender), and distinct emotional poses for each frame, including specific lighting effects (red light, motion blur).

She wears a delicate thin gold necklace resting on her collarbone and a stylish checkered top with visible fabric texture and stitching.

Lips look hydrated and glossy, skin luminous and smooth, realistic light reflections on cheeks and forehead.
Both faces are very close to the camera, filling most of the frame, creating an intimate selfie feel. Playful, goofy, carefree mood, strong sense of friendship and shared laughter. Warm indoor lighting with soft golden tones, cozy ambience, gentle shadows shaping the face, natural color balance. Background softly blurred and unobtrusive, hint of an indoor room without distraction.

content:
I. Composition
1 Layout: Overall 3:4 ratio, four-panel collage, 3:4 small images arranged in 2x2
2 Framing: Close-up to extreme close-up, subject occupies a large proportion of the screen
3 Angle: Eye-level close-up, slight left/right variation, uniform clean background

II. Main Subject
1 Reference Source: Use uploaded reference image as the strict identity source
2 Consistency Requirement: Zero deviation
3 Face: Delicate face shape, slightly large eyes, a small mole below the right eye, long and thin nose bridge
4 Skin Quality: Fair with light pink undertones, delicate skin, slight soft focus
5 Details: Prominent highlights on the nose bridge and mid-face, slight redness on cheeks and nose tip, scattered light freckles

III. Makeup Details
1 Base Makeup: Transparent and clean, light matte finish with slight sheen
2 Blush: Pink concentrated on the cheeks and sides of the nose bridge
3 Eye Makeup: Naturally enlarged, long lashes, clear eyes
4 Lip Makeup: Hydrated, plump lips, gradient from light pink to peach, soft cupid's bow

IV. Hairstyle and Accessories
1 Hairstyle: Black long straight hair, center part, full volume, naturally draped
2 Flyaways: Small amount of hair naturally floating around the forehead
3 Hair Accessories: One pink hair clip on each side, bright pink and light pink colors, metal clip visible

V. Hands and Accessories
1 Nails: Extra-long shape, translucent or light colors, with fine glitter and 3D decorations
2 Rings: Multiple pink cute-shaped rings, candy and floral aesthetics, exaggerated but soft and cute volume
3 Hand Gesture Style: Near the face and lips, highlighting nail and ring details

VI. Clothing and Material
1 Top: Fuzzy textured jacket or sleeves, white fluffy and soft
2 Inner Wear: Light pink camisole or top, off-shoulder or one-shoulder effect
3 Overall Style: Sweet and soft, with a touch of cool edge

VII. Four Panel Actions and Expressions
1 Top Left: Hands cupping face close to the camera, expression is cold and slightly wronged, looking directly at the camera
2 Top Right: Finger near the lips or lightly touching the lip edge, eyes calm and slightly teasing, closer extreme close-up
3 Bottom Left: Chin or arm resting on the edge of a table, eyes looking sideways, expression is dazed and vacant
4 Bottom Right: Hand clenched lightly against the chin, smiling but restrained, looking directly at the camera, more approachable demeanor

VIII. Lighting and Tone
1 Lighting: High-key soft light, very shallow shadows, uniform overall
2 Color Tone: Predominantly cool white background, pink accents highlighted, skin tone leans cool pink
3 Contrast: Low contrast, clean and transparent, not heavy

IX. Texture and Visual Effect
1 Clarity: Features and hair strands are clear, skin details preserved but with slight blurring/softening
2 Depth of Field: Background blur is very weak or almost textureless, subject is more prominent
3 Atmosphere: Sweet Korean girl group magazine photo style, sweet and cute, delicate and dreamy, slight glass-like sheen.

GLOBAL STYLE & QUALITY

Ultra-high resolution hyper-realistic photography, natural skin texture, real-world lighting physics, true-to-life proportions, cinematic shallow depth of field, premium lifestyle photo realism, no stylization, no CGI look, no illustration artifacts

FACE

Soft youthful face with natural symmetry, smooth realistic skin pores, subtle blush on cheeks, gentle smile
One eye playfully winking, the other eye open and expressive
Natural makeup, light peach lips, soft eyeliner, no exaggerated beauty edits
BODY
Slim feminine body with soft natural curves, realistic waist-to-hip ratio
Relaxed but confident posture, shoulders slightly back
Body language is flirty yet casual, not posed like a model, feels spontaneous

SKIN

Fair skin tone with very subtle sun warmth, smooth transitions
No artificial shine, no plastic skin
Natural light reflecting softly on shoulders and arms
HAIR
Long brown hair tied in a high ponytail, loose natural waves
A few soft strands framing the face
Hair texture is realistic, individual strands visible under sunlight

CAMERA & ANGLE

Medium full-body shot
Camera positioned slightly below chest level, angled to the side
Subject turned sideways, body angled while face looks toward camera
Natural lens compression, realistic focal length (50–85mm look)
SETTING
Outdoor rooftop or terrace environment
{argument name="lighting time" default="Golden hour sunset"} lighting
Background softly blurred with natural bokeh
 No identifiable people in background, only vague architectural shapes

SCENE SETUP

Casual candid moment
Subject holding a smartphone in one hand
Other hand raised near face making a peace sign (V sign)
Feels like a spontaneous lifestyle photo, not staged
BIKINI / OUTFIT
Top: Strapless {argument name="bikini color" default="grey"} tube bikini-style top, tight fit, exposing shoulders and collarbones
Bottom: High-waisted denim short shorts with lace-up front detail, distressed edges
Outfit is minimal, youthful, summer casual
No logos, no distracting patterns

PROPS (FLATLAY FEEL)

Smartphone held naturally in hand
No additional accessories
Focus stays on body language and outfit
EXPRESSION & MOOD
Playful, confident, teasing expression
Winking adds flirt energy
Mood is light, warm, approachable, seductive without being explicit
ATMOSPHERE

Warm sunset tones
Soft highlights on skin
Balanced exposure — no overblown whites, no crushed shadows
Natural ambient light only

FINAL RESULT GOAL
A hyper-realistic seductive lifestyle photograph that looks like it was taken by a professional photographer during golden hour,
natural, believable, premium social media aesthetic,
 bold but classy, flirty without exaggeration,
indistinguishable from a real photo.

content:
Use the provided reference image as the sole identity and facial structure reference. Create a 3 by 3 grid of face focused portraits of the same woman, maintaining identical facial features, proportions, expression baseline, and realism across all frames.

Each panel should show a distinct head angle and facial perspective, while preserving lighting consistency, lens realism, and natural skin texture. No change in hairstyle, makeup style, or facial identity.

Grid breakdown

Top row
1.Front facing neutral angle, eyes looking directly into camera
2.Three quarter view facing right, slight head tilt, eyes forward
3.Full right side profile, clean silhouette of nose, lips, and jawline

Middle row
4. Three quarter view facing left, soft head tilt, confident gaze
5. Slight low angle looking down toward the camera, subtle power pose
6. Slight high angle looking upward, relaxed expression

Bottom row
7. Head turned right with eyes looking back toward camera
8. Head turned left with eyes looking back toward camera
9. Near rear three quarter angle showing cheekbone, jawline, and ear contour

Technical and visual requirements

Ultra realistic portrait photography
85mm lens look, shallow depth of field
Sharp facial detail, visible skin texture, natural pores
Soft daylight illumination with gentle shadow falloff
Neutral background with no distractions
Consistent framing so all faces align cleanly within the grid
High resolution, editorial quality, fashion and beauty standard

Strict constraints

Do not alter facial structure
Do not stylize or cartoonize
Do not change expression drastically
No text, no watermark, no distortion
Same person in all nine frames

content:
Create an ultra-realistic, high-end lifestyle portrait of one adult subject, captured in a calm, elegant, modern café environment. The subject is seated casually inside a circular wooden frame embedded with warm LED rim lighting, surrounded by lush green foliage and soft floral decor. The pose is relaxed and natural: one leg crossed over the other, body slightly angled, shoulders relaxed, hands resting naturally while holding a small bouquet of fresh flowers. Overall mood is warm, clean, elegant, youthful, and approachable — pure realism only. No stylization, no fantasy, no cinematic exaggeration.

Use my uploaded face image as the ONLY facial identity reference

Maintain 100% facial accuracy: exact bone structure, eye shape, eyelid fold, eyebrow shape, nose bridge and tip, lip shape, jawline, chin, cheek volume, hairline, and facial proportions

Identity must remain perfectly consistent from all angles (front, 3/4, side, seated pose, slight head tilt)

No face blending, no beautification, no symmetry correction

No AI face drift

Preserve real skin texture: pores, fine lines, natural imperfections

Expression: soft, natural smile, relaxed and genuine

Soft pastel long-sleeve knit top (dusty pink / muted rose tone)

High-waisted, straight-fit beige or cream trousers

Clean white chunky sneakers

Minimal accessories only (simple earrings, smartwatch or minimal wrist accessory)

Hair neatly styled, natural, pulled back or softly tied

Natural makeup: realistic skin tones, no heavy retouching

Modern café or lifestyle studio interior

Circular wooden structure with embedded warm LED light ring

Green plants and floral arrangements integrated into the frame

Soft bokeh background with warm ambient lighting

Clean, uncluttered setting with depth and realism

Full-body or 3/4 body vertical portrait

Eye-level camera angle

50mm–85mm lens look

Natural perspective, no distortion

Subject centered within the circular frame

Shallow depth of field, background softly blurred

Soft, warm, diffused lighting

LED rim light gently outlining the circular frame

Even facial illumination with natural shadow falloff

No harsh highlights, no blown whites

Realistic skin reflections and depth

Negative prompt:

No stylization

No cinematic color grading

No beauty filters

No smooth or plastic skin

No exaggerated proportions

No painterly or illustrated look

No artificial glow

No face morphing or identity shift

Ultra-photorealistic

Editorial lifestyle photography quality

Natural colors, true-to-life skin tones

Identity remains unchanged and accurate from every angle

content:
(Vertical 9:16 smartphone aspect ratio). A raw, high-contrast [Gym Interior Mirror Capture] taken with an iPhone 17 Pro using the 0.5x ultra-wide-angle lens. NO ARTIFICIAL BOKEH. Every focal plane remains SHARP and in focus, from the subject's skin to the distant gym equipment.
Subject & Identity Locking:
•Identity: Strictly preserve the exact heart-shaped facial structure and unique features of the woman in Image 1 (Selfie).
•Bio-Fidelity: Render high-fidelity "TrueLens" biological physics: visible micro-pores, a natural "satin-finish" night hydration glow, and fine vellus hair catching the overhead light ONLY along the jawline.
•Silhouette Calibration (MAXIMUM UFF-FACTOR): Prioritize a dominant structural upper-torso volume and substantial, thick-toned anatomical depth in the lower extremities. Focus on an aggressive architectural tapering at the midsection to maximize the S-curve geometry.
Outfit & Textural Interaction:
•Clothing: A high-density, matte-black technical textile tee and matching high-tension minimalist athletic shorts.
•Tension: The technical fabric exhibits extreme mechanical tension and a vacuum-tight fit, creating realistic textural expansion and "tension lines" where the material contours to her fit silhouette.
•Matter Physics: White high-density cotton crew socks showing realistic textural contact and weight distribution against the tiled floor.
Pose & Composition:
•Pose: A 3/4 side-profile mirror selfie. She is standing with an axial rotation of the torso toward the mirror, arching her spine and popping her hip to highlight the symmetrical 3D volume of her physique.
•Action: Her RIGHT HAND holds a smartphone with a decorative casing, capturing the full-body "fit-check" reflection.
•UI Overlay: A white digital clock timestamp in the top-left corner reads "8:33 PM" in a simple sans-serif font.
Environment & Social Realism:
•Lighting: Direct, harsh overhead industrial lighting creating high-contrast specular highlights and deep, defining shadows that amplify her 3D form.
•Background (SHARP): A detailed commercial gym interior. A vibrant neon-green structural pillar, a white tiled floor with visible grout lines, and dark athletic benches are all perfectly IN FOCUS. No artificial blur.

Her friends are blowing up her phone, but she’s struggling with the final touch: a reflective, high-tension vinyl corset. She snatches a quick, tense mirror selfie in the hallway to check if the zipper is going to hold, capturing the rush, the sweaty skin from the stress, and the sheer chaos of trying to achieve peak glamour under pressure. She's not smiling; she's intensely focused on the phone screen's preview.

content:
(Vertical 9:16 smartphone aspect ratio). A raw, high-contrast [Candid Mirror Documentation] captured with an iPhone 17 Pro using the 0.5x ultra-wide-angle optic. NO ARTIFICIAL BOKEH. Everything remains SHARP and in focus from the subject's skin to the distant urban masonry.
Subject & Identity Locking:
•Identity: Strictly preserve the exact facial structure and unique features of the woman in Image 1 (Selfie).
•Appearance: Short dark auburn-red hair styled in a sleek, chin-length architectural bob.
•Bio-Fidelity: Render high-fidelity "TrueLens" biological physics: visible micro-pores, a natural "satin-finish" skin hydration glow, and fine vellus hair catching the light ONLY along the jawline. Her skin features a healthy, uniform tone.
•Silhouette Calibration (MAXIMUM UFF-FACTOR): Prioritize a dominant structural upper-torso volume and substantial, thick-toned anatomical depth in the lower extremities. Emphasize an aggressive architectural tapering at the midsection to maximize the S-curve geometry.
Outfit & Textural Interaction:
•Clothing: A high-density ribbed light-pink textile bodice featuring delicate ivory-colored architectural lace trim. Paired with high-tension minimalist elasticated lower apparel.
•Tension: The technical fabric exhibits extreme mechanical tension and a vacuum-tight fit, creating realistic textural expansion, skin-to-textile indentations, and "compression lines" where the material contours to her fit silhouette.
•Action: The subject is captured performing a manual upward adjustment of the bodice hem, creating realistic fabric-stress vectors and highlighting the fit anatomical depth of the midriff.
Pose & Composition:
•Pose: A straight-on frontal composition within a large circular reflective frame. She is standing with a bilateral hip-pop to accentuate the symmetrical volume and fit proportions of her physique.
•Action: Her RIGHT HAND holds a white smartphone with a clear protective casing, capturing the full-body "fit-check" reflection.
Environment & Social Realism:
•Lighting: Naturalistic indoor daylight streaming from a side-view window, creating high-contrast specular highlights and deep, defining shadows that amplify her 3D form.
•Background (SHARP): A detailed domestic interior showing uncurated realism. A bed with textured grey compressed linens, a digital musical synthesizer, and a dark suitcase are all perfectly IN FOCUS. Visible through the glass is a sharp, red-brick urban structure. No artificial blur.
Quality: Raw unedited social-media dump aesthetic, high dynamic range, visible digital grain in the deep shadows, 8k resolution. Everything is sharp, detailed, and physically real.
title: Ultra-Wide Candid Mirror Documentation Portrait Prompt
description: A highly technical prompt for generating a raw, high-contrast candid mirror documentation portrait using an ultra-wide-angle lens (0.5x) with NO artificial bokeh, ensuring everything is sharp. It mandates strict identity locking and focuses intensely on bio-fidelity details like micro-pores, vellus hair, and realistic fabric tension/indentations on the subject's fitted attire.

content:
[Theme] A young woman with dark brown/black hair styled in a bun, with a few wispy bangs falling on her forehead; looking directly at the camera, with a calm and slightly languid expression. Right hand supporting her cheek, left hand holding a phone in a selfie pose.

[Makeup and Skin Texture] Natural, clear makeup, clean eye makeup, distinct eyelashes, moist lips; extremely delicate skin, the overall complexion shows a blue-purple sheen under the cold light.

[Clothing] White thin-strap low-cut top (simple, fitted style).

[Accessories] Layered transparent pink beaded bracelet and a thin gold chain bracelet (with small flower/clover pendant) on the wrist; nails painted with light nude nail polish.

[Props] A bright yellow phone/phone case is very eye-catching (located in the lower left corner of the frame), enhancing the realism of a “casual social selfie.”

[Scene] Dim restaurant/bar atmosphere, with thick black curtains as the background; white round table with wine glasses and small objects, multiple warm yellow table lamps creating a cozy ambient light.

[Light and Color] The subject is illuminated by cold blue-purple fill light (such as screen light/LED fill light), while the background emits warm yellow tungsten light, forming a sharp cold/warm contrast; the background is slightly blurred to highlight the portrait.

[Photography Language] Vertical composition, close-up half-body shot (above the chest), slightly high-angle/eye-level perspective, with the texture of a phone portrait mode, medium-shallow depth of field, and the image texture is “clear yet soft.”

content: Overview: This photo captures a highly atmospheric indoor Mirror Selfie. It freezes a moment of a young Asian woman in a relaxed state, featuring a strong "Pure and Desire" style (Innocent yet alluring) and an authentic social media lifestyle vibe.  Subject Features: Female, with fair complexion (cool porcelain skin). Her long black hair is tied back (into a low ponytail or bun), with air bangs framing her forehead and face. The makeup is exquisite yet natural, emphasizing reddish lips and a clear, translucent foundation.  Expression & Mood: Her eyes are either dreamy or focused on the phone screen, with her head tilted slightly, conveying a sense of nonchalant elegance. Her mouth is closed, and her expression is calm with a hint of sultriness.  Pose: Seated. She sits on a black leather chair, leaning back. Her right hand rests lazily behind her head/neck area, while her left hand holds the phone (silver iPhone) to take the mirror selfie. This pose naturally showcases her neck and shoulder lines.  Outfit Details: The core visual point is the "slouchy / effortlessly disheveled" style. She wears a white deep V-neck long-sleeved top (the material looks soft, like modal or fine knit). The neckline slips off, revealing her collarbones, a large area of skin on her chest, and visible black thin bra straps, creating a classic "black and white contrast" and a hint of sexiness. She wears black trousers on the bottom.  Environment & Lighting: The background is very simple, featuring beige/grey wallpaper and wooden door frames or mirror frames on the sides. The lighting is soft and even, resembling indoor natural light or softbox lighting, giving the skin a delicate texture. There is a black hair tie on her wrist (adding a touch of realistic detail).  Vibe: Intimate, casual, the refined daily life of an urban woman, and a sense of relaxation.

content: Scene: Nighttime inside a car (driver’s seat, on the left side of the frame). The instrument cluster and center console glow with crisp cool white/blue backlighting. Outside the window is a dim roadway with streetlight bokeh, adding a slight sense of motion and an urban night atmosphere.  Subject & emotion: A young adult woman sits on the left side of the image and turns her head to the right to look back at the camera. She makes direct eye contact with a playful, subtly flirty “caught candid” vibe. She holds her left hand horizontally across the lower half of her face, revealing only her eyes and brow area—an instantly memorable gesture.  Hair & texture: Long, straight hair with a slightly center part; light blonde with even lighter highlighted streaks. The strands look smooth and glossy, catching reflections from the flash.  Outfit: A black spaghetti-strap bra-style top paired with low-rise jeans, giving an authentic “night out / getting into the car after a party” social-media feel.  Detail boosters: Nude/pale pink manicure; a delicate chain bracelet on the wrist. Warm fair skin tone. The direct flash creates high contrast and soft shadows that sculpt the body and add dimension.  Photography language: Clear smartphone on-camera flash in a dark environment. Vertical close medium framing, shot from the passenger side/back-seat angle, capturing her upper body along with the steering wheel, door trim, and dashboard—very Instagram/social-media candid.
title: Candid Night Car Selfie with Flash
