content:
Ultra-photorealistic smartphone selfie photo (front camera), portrait 4:5. A young adult woman seated at a kitchen table, centered framing from mid-torso to top of head. She has shoulder-length dark brown hair with soft layers, curtain bangs, and two small black hair clips on both sides. Expression is calm and slightly pouty, natural skin texture, minimal makeup. She raises her hand close to her face making a peace/V sign, with the fingers framing one eye. She wears a white ribbed camisole with delicate lace trim.
Lighting is strong direct morning sunlight coming from a large window on the left, creating hard shadows and bright highlights across her face, chest, and the table.
Environment: a bright modern kitchen with white walls and cabinets; a refrigerator in the background covered with small colorful magnets/souvenir magnets.
Foreground on the table: a white pump lotion bottle, a blue plastic water bottle, an amber pill/vitamin bottle, a pack of wet wipes, and some snack packaging including a red rectangular box, all slightly cluttered and casually placed.
Style: realistic color, natural contrast, sharp focus, high detail, authentic candid selfie look, HDR-like dynamic range, subtle film grain, no retouching, no beauty filter.
Negative Prompt (use this)
Blurry, low-res, over-smoothed skin, heavy makeup, glam retouching, unrealistic doll face, warped hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, deformed peace sign, crossed eyes, bad anatomy, distorted background, duplicated objects, text, watermark, logo, posterized lighting.
Suggested Settings
Aspect ratio: 4:5
Lens look: smartphone wide (24–28mm equivalent)
Quality: high / ultra detail
Style strength: low–medium (keep it natural)
also make watermark "doctorwasif" at bottom right corner

(Vertical 9:16 smartphone aspect ratio). A raw, high-contrast [Mirror Capture] taken with an iPhone 17 Pro. NO ARTIFICIAL BOKEH. All planes of the image are SHARP and in focus from the subject's feet to the background window blinds.

•Clothing: A high-tension light-{argument name="top color" default="yellow"} cropped jersey-knit top and ultra-fitted {argument name="shorts color" default="white"} high-elasticity micro-shorts with a wide waistband.
•Tension: The technical fabric shows extreme mechanical tension and a vacuum-tight fit, creating realistic physical interaction and "tension lines" where the material contours to her fit silhouette.
•Matter Physics: Realistic skin-to-surface compression (squish) is visible where her torso and thighs interact with the high-texture grey bedding. Her raised feet show detailed anatomical sole textures.
Pose & Composition:
•Pose: A prone horizontal alignment (lying on her stomach) with an axial rotation of the torso toward the mirror. Her lower limbs are elevated at the knees.
•Action: Her RIGHT HAND holds a pink smartphone at a natural angle, capturing the full-body "fit-check" reflection.
Environment & Social Realism:

•Background (SHARP): A detailed domestic bedroom. A window with horizontal blinds, dark heavy curtains, and a grey textured faux-fur duvet are all perfectly IN FOCUS. No artificial depth-of-field.

painting/illustration look, heavy stylization, cartoon, warped face, extra fingers, deformed hands, duplicated phone, text artifacts, unreadable signage, watermark, logo, over-sharpening, HDR haloing, extreme blur, low-res, uncanny eyes, incorrect museum context

content: Use the uploaded reference photo. Low-resolution smartphone close-up selfie taken with a broken front camera screen. The image shows strong natural motion blur concentrated on the woman’s face, hair, and the cat, caused by weak autofocus, slow shutter speed, and slight hand movement while lying down. Blur appears uneven and organic, with soft smearing rather than smooth artificial blur. Facial features are partially obscured but still recognizable, with eyes, nose, and mouth visible as softened shapes. A young woman lies intimately on a cream-colored leather sofa. A light brown cat with bright green eyes is lying on the woman’s chest, pressing its body close and nuzzling its face against the woman’s cheek and jaw, partially covering her face. The cat’s head and the woman’s face overlap closely, creating intimate contact. Both the woman’s face and the cat’s face are noticeably blurred together, with softened edges and slight motion smear from small movements and breathing. The woman’s long brown hair is loose and slightly messy, falling over her forehead and partially blending into the cat’s fur due to blur. Hair strands appear heavily softened but still natural, not melted or warped. The cat’s fur texture is mostly lost, appearing as soft blurred patches consistent with low resolution and motion. Overall sharpness is low, with inconsistent focus across the frame — some tiny areas accidentally a bit clearer while most of the face and the cat remain out of focus. Flat, noisy skin texture with visible ISO noise, chroma noise, mild color banding, and muddy shadows typical of a cheap phone camera. The woman looks toward the lens with a soft, relaxed, intimate expression, though details are softened by blur. She wears simple, light-colored casual clothing, with fabric texture mostly lost. Lighting comes only from indoor room lights at night, slightly too bright, with mild overexposed highlights that do not completely blow out facial structure. Perspective distortion from the front camera wide-angle lens creates subtle stretching near the edges. The composition is very tight, awkward, and unintentional, filling the frame with the woman’s face and the cat’s body and head. The image feels like a raw, accidental selfie straight from the phone gallery — imperfect, intimate, noisy, naturally blurred, completely unedited, with no beautification and no AI enhancement.  NEGATIVE WARNINGS (important): high resolution, sharp focus, DSLR, cinematic lighting, studio lighting, ultra-detail, clean skin texture, beauty filter, HDR, professional photo, sharp edges, smooth look, AI enhancement, overprocessing, perfect blur, depth-of-field bokeh. ar 9:16

(Vertical 9:16 smartphone aspect ratio). A raw, high-contrast mirror selfie captured with an iPhone 17 Pro. NO ARTIFICIAL BOKEH. Everything is SHARP and in focus, from the decorative tree in the foreground to the sofa in the background.

Subject & Identity Locking:

Identity: Strictly preserve the exact face and unique features of the woman in Image 1 (Selfie).
Bio-Fidelity: Render high-fidelity skin physics: visible micro-pores, natural "satin-finish" skin hydration, and fine vellus hair catching the light ONLY along the jawline.
Expression (CRITICAL): Replicate the exact pouty, heavy-lidded, and blank yet confident expression from the provided reference. She looks into the mirror with a relaxed, slightly unimpressed or "bored" aesthetic, with full, relaxed lips and a neutral, direct gaze.
Silhouette Calibration: Amplify the dominant structural bust volume and the substantial, thick-toned leg presence. Focus on the aggressive hourglass structural tapering at the waist and the defined anatomical depth of the midriff.
Outfit & Physicality:

Clothing: A matching heather-grey jersey athletic set. The top is an ultra-crop long-sleeve, and the bottom is a pair of skin-tight micro-shorts.
Tension & Physics: The fabric shows extreme elastic tension and a vacuum-tight fit. Her RIGHT HAND is pulling down the waistband of the shorts slightly, creating realistic tension lines and a natural skin indentation on her hip.
Pose & Composition:

Pose: Standing frontally in a large circular mirror with a gold frame. Her torso is slightly arched to highlight the symmetrical curvature and athletic lines of her silhouette.
Action: Her LEFT HAND holds a white iPhone 17 Pro at eye level, capturing the full-body reflection.
Environment & Lighting:

Lighting: Realistic indoor overhead lighting that creates defining shadows under the bust and along the abdominal muscles, enhancing the 3D volume of her form.
Background (SHARP): The reflection reveals a detailed living area: a dark grey sectional sofa, a wall with a thermostat, and a messy pile of clothes on a chair.
Foreground: A dark wooden table in front of the mirror holds a mini gold-glitter decorative tree and scattered papers. Everything is perfectly IN FOCUS.
Quality: Raw unedited social-media dump aesthetic, high dynamic range, visible digital grain in the deep shadows, 8k resolution.

content:
A natural, modern indoor mirror-selfie portrait of a young woman inside a stylish contemporary apartment. The image is captured at mid-to-full body length from a slightly angled side profile, reflected in a mirror. She holds a smartphone near her shoulder while taking the photo, gently turning her head back toward the mirror with a subtle, confident smile that feels relaxed and intimate.
Her expression is calm and self-assured, with relaxed eyes and softly lifted lips, conveyingeffortless confidence. She has a light-to-medium skin tone with natural texture, soft blush on the cheeks, and minimal makeup—defined brows, lightly enhanced eyes, and natural nude-toned lips. Her long dark brown hair is worn loose and straight with a slight natural wave, parted near the center, falling smoothly down her back with a few soft strands framing her face.
She wears a {argument name="clothing item" default="cropped light gray knit sweater"} with long sleeves, paired with high-waisted, loose-fitting blue denim jeans, creating a casual yet flattering silhouette. Her posture is relaxed and candid, body angled sideways with one shoulder slightly raised, reinforcing an authentic lifestyle feel.
The background features a clean, modern interior with warm wooden flooring, dark wood-paneled walls, a door and light switches, and subtle details such as a piano and a large window revealing a distant city skyline. The background remains softly out of focus to keep attention on the subject.
Lighting is warm, natural, and evenly diffused, illuminating her face and body without harsh shadows and creating a cozy, lived-in atmosphere. The color palette blends warm wood tones, soft grays, denim blues, and natural skin hues for a calm, contemporary, aesthetically balanced look.
The overall mood is intimate, modern, stylish, and effortlessly cool—like a quiet personal moment captured at home.
Use the uploaded image as the only and exact face reference. Preserve identical facial identity, structure, proportions, and expression with no alterations.

content:
Use the uploaded image strictly as the identity reference. Preserve the same person, facial structure, hairstyle, age, gender, body proportions, and likeness exactly. Do not add or remove any person. Do not change identity. Convert the subject into an ultra-cute kindergarten-style crayon doodle illustration.

Illustration Style:
Hand-drawn kindergarten doodle made with crayons and soft colored pencils. Lines should be thick, rounded, uneven, and slightly shaky, like a small child’s drawing. Outlines are imperfect, playful, and soft, never sharp or clean.

Color & Texture:
Bright pastel crayon colors with soft, chalky texture. Flat coloring with visible crayon grain and overlapping strokes. Colors may go slightly outside the lines to enhance the childlike feel. No realistic gradients; only simple color fills and soft watercolor-like blobs.

Facial Features:
Very simple and adorable facial features. Big round dot eyes, tiny curved smile, minimal or no nose. Cheeks can have soft pink crayon circles. Expression should feel innocent, happy, and friendly.

Proportions & Form:
Chibi-like doodle proportions — large head, small rounded body, short arms and legs. Hands and feet are simple mitten or oval shapes. Anatomy should look intentionally naive and cute.

Shading & Lighting:
No realistic lighting. No depth or shadows. If needed, add light pastel crayon scribbles under the character for grounding only.

Mood & Atmosphere:
Sweet, cozy, wholesome, and joyful. Feels like an illustration from a nursery book or a child’s school drawing. Very warm and comforting emotional tone.

Background:
Simple doodle background with crayon-drawn clouds, sun, stars, hearts, flowers, or soft scribbles. Use light pastel paper tones. Background must remain minimal and playful.

Rendering Rules:
No photorealism, no photo texture, no cinematic lighting, no digital painting, no anime, no manga, no 3D, no vector art. Everything must look hand-drawn with crayons and pencils.

Final Output:
An ultra-cute kindergarten-style crayon doodle illustration with childlike proportions, playful pastel colors, and innocent expressions, maintaining the exact identity from the uploaded image in a warm children’s storybook style.
title: Kindergarten Crayon Doodle Illustration Prompt
description: A highly detailed image generation prompt designed to convert an uploaded identity reference (person) into an ultra-cute, kindergarten-style crayon doodle illustration. The prompt specifies style, color, texture, facial features, proportions, and rendering rules to ensure a warm, childlike, and innocent aesthetic while strictly preserving the subject's identity.

The environment remains an indoor gym with full height mirrors, warm overhead lighting, and softly blurred equipment in the background. The atmosphere feels intimate yet energetic, combining elegance, strength, and modern athletic aesthetics.

content:
1. Scouter Prompt
Overlays a Scouter-style UI onto the reference image and infers and displays the combat power based on the character's features.

2. Super Transformation Prompt
Maintains the character features from the reference image and changes the pose to an 'Awakening Pose' to 'Super Transform' them. 'Super Transformation' can be selected from Form 1 to Form 3, as well as God Form, Blue Form, Extreme Form, and Rose Form.

3. Field Deployment Prompt
Changes the character in the reference image to a pose with hands extended forward and deploys a field.

4. Retro RPG Status Screen Prompt
A prompt that converts the character in the reference image into pixel art and generates an image styled like a retro RPG status screen.

5. Desktop Mascot Prompt
A prompt that generates an image of the character from the reference image turned into a desktop mascot and placed on a PC screen.

6. Style Change Only on Torn Parts Prompt
Adds a tearing effect without changing the reference image itself, allowing the art style of only the torn part to be freely switched to line art, ink painting, figure style, colored pencil, watercolor, pencil drawing, etc.

7. Art Style Conversion Prompt
A prompt created by modifying the 'Style Change Only on Torn Parts Prompt' to change the overall art style.

8. Super Robot Wars Battle Sequence Prompt
A prompt that generates an image styled like a Super Robot Wars battle sequence from the reference image.

9. Power Release Prompt
A prompt that reproduces the depiction of a spherical energy space destroying an object.

10. Participation Screen Prompt
A prompt that generates a 'Participation Screen' for the character in the reference image.

11. Total Concentration Prompt
Maintains the character from the reference image and infers and depicts 'Weapon, Breathing Style, Form, and Move Name' from the character's atmosphere and stance.

12. Kamehameha Style Prompt
A prompt that can stably generate the charging pose and activation pose of 'Kamehameha.'

13. Figure Transformation + Product Introduction Layout Prompt
A prompt that transforms the character in the reference image into a figure and lays it out in a product introduction style.

14. Final Flash Style Prompt
Converts the character in the reference image into the activation, charging, and firing poses of 'Final Flash.' Dialogue and sound effects can be added to each.

15. New Profile Image Generation Prompt
Generates the character from the reference image in an arbitrary aspect ratio and places an arbitrary string as a logo in an arbitrary position.

16. Plastic Model Package Prompt
Generates an image styled like a 'Plastic Model Package' by placing the reference image on the front and side.

17. Eraser Gun Style Prompt
The character in the reference image emits an Eraser Gun-style energy wave from their mouth.

18. Ragged Transformation Prompt
A prompt that transforms the character in the reference image into 'rags.'

content:
Using the user-uploaded reference image as the base, add a classic Christmas Santa hat to the subject.

Integration: match the existing lighting, shadows, highlights, linework, and rendering style. Add realistic contact shadows where the hat touches hair/forehead. Do not alter the face, hair, background, clothing, or any other elements.

Output: square (1:1) avatar, crisp and clear at small profile-picture size.

content:
A high-angle selfie perspective captures a young woman with a light skin tone and a subtle tan, sitting on a dark hardwood floor partially covered by a plush white faux fur rug, with one arm extended toward the lens holding the camera. Her legs are bent and tucked to the side. She wears a chunky cream-colored cable-knit sweater dress with a thick, textured knit pattern and an off-the-shoulder neckline that exposes her shoulders and collarbone, finished with long, oversized sleeves. Her long, voluminous blonde hair falls in loose waves with a side part. Her makeup features defined eyebrows, striking winged eyeliner, glossy nude lips, and soft contouring. She holds a soft, alluring gaze, her head tilted slightly to the right.

The setting is a richly cozy, dimly lit living room interior designed for warmth and comfort. Behind her is a substantial, rough-cut natural stone fireplace constructed with professional masonry, its uneven stone surface catching the firelight as bright orange flames burn steadily within. The surrounding space features dark, polished hardwood floors and well-appointed, comfortable furniture with a lived-in, upscale lodge-like feel. In the background, a decorated Christmas tree glows softly, strung with warm white lights that fall into gentle bokeh blur in the distance, adding depth and seasonal atmosphere without distracting from the subject. Christmas presents with colorful wrapping surround the base of the Christmas tree. The overall interior feels intimate, inviting, and quietly luxurious.

Lighting is dominated by a direct on-camera flash, producing crisp highlights on the subject and pronounced shadows cast behind her, while the fireplace provides a secondary warm ambient glow that subtly fills the room. The image aesthetic evokes early-2000s digital camera photography blended with influencer lifestyle imagery, capturing a cozy winter evening mood through a palette of warm neutrals, creamy whites, amber firelight, and deep brown shadows.
title: Cozy Yule Tide Selfie Portrait
description: A detailed prompt for generating a high-angle, cozy winter selfie portrait of a young woman in a cable-knit sweater dress, set in a dimly lit, upscale living room with a fireplace and a glowing Christmas tree, utilizing early 2000s digital camera aesthetics and flash photography.

content: Create a monochrome studio portrait of a man. Use minimal lighting with soft falloff so the focus stays entirely on him, with subtle gradients and deep shadows shaping his face. The composition should be a tight-medium shot against a clean, distraction-free background. He’s dressed in a casual, stylish outfit—like a simple tee or sweatshirt with light texture that works well in black and white. The overall mood should feel calm and confident, with a pleasing, balanced vibe. Render it in high-contrast black and white with crisp details, smooth tones, and a subtle cinematic depth.
title: High-Contrast Monochrome Studio Portrait of a Man
description: A prompt for generating a high-contrast, black and white studio portrait of a man. It emphasizes minimal lighting with soft falloff to focus attention entirely on the subject, creating subtle gradients and deep shadows for a calm, confident, and cinematic mood.

content:
Use the uploaded image as the reference for the subject's face and likeness. Do not alter facial features; maintain 100% feature consistency. Generate the image in a Vertical 9:16 aspect ratio. The image must be strictly taller than it is wide (portrait orientation) to simulate a full-screen smartphone photo.
The subject is taking a POV selfie with one arm visibly stretched out towards the camera lens. The camera device itself is not visible. She is looking directly into the lens with a 'Cold Stare' expression—sharp direct eye contact, lips closed, icy and powerful. The camera angle is a dynamic Dutch Angle (tilted).
The setting is a 'Rooftop Night' with a glass railing behind her and a bokeh city skyline in the distance. The atmosphere is a 'Neon Night,' with {argument name="neon colors" default="blue and pink"} light casting a cyberpunk glow on her skin. In the background, blurred by deep bokeh, there is a hint of 'Nightlife' activity with people standing in line.
She is wearing a rich {argument name="top color" default="burgundy"} 'Velvet Off-Shoulder Bustier' paired with a high-waisted black 'Leather Mini' skirt. Her hair is styled in a severe 'Slicked-Back Bun.' Her makeup focuses on 'Siren Eyes' with elongated eyeliner.
Her free hand is holding a 'Takeaway Cocktail' in a clear plastic cup with a neon straw and glowing ice cubes. On the wrist of the stretched arm, she wears a 'Thick Silver Curb Chain' bracelet. Her nails are long 'Vampy Stiletto' style in deep black. She wears a 'Statement Silver' cuban link chain. The image has a sharp modern smartphone aesthetic.

content:
Subject:
A young woman with a sun-kissed, fair complexion and a constellation of freckles most prominent across the bridge of her nose and cheeks, rendered with Deep Fusion texture accuracy. Her hair is a cascade of long, tousled brown waves. She has one eye open—a sharp, captivating green/hazel orb with intricate iris detail—and one eye closed in a wink. Her eyebrows are full, dark, and naturally shaped.

Attire & Details:

She wears a playful black bikini top with classic white polka dots. A delicate, layered gold chain necklace rests at her neck, catching the light.

Expression & Pose:

Her expression is irresistibly cheeky and playful. She winks with her right eye (viewer's left), her tongue peeking out slightly at the corner of her smiling mouth, revealing a glimpse of teeth. Her right hand rests casually atop her head, fingers lightly buried in her hair. The frame is a close-up, selfie-style portrait where the curve of her arm holding the device is visible, creating an intimate, immediate feel.

Environment & New Shot Setup:

She is in the sea, swimming. The shot is now captured from above by a drone. Below her stretches clear, turquoise water. The background is a tropical beach or coastal setting with blurred vibrant green palm leaves or a sandy shoreline.

Lighting:

The scene is bathed in bright, natural daylight. Sunlight filtering through leaves above creates soft, dynamic patterns of light and shadow on the water's surface and on the young woman, expertly balanced by Smart HDR processing to preserve detail in both highlights and shadows. Sparkling glints and reflections on the water add visual richness.

Technical Specifications:

Device: iPhone 17 Pro Max (simulating Drone Control/Recording)

Camera: Main or Telephoto Lens (suited for top-down shot)

Lens: 48mm or 77mm equivalent, wide aperture

Shot Details: 48MP ProRAW / HEIF Max

Processing: Photonic Engine, Deep Fusion, Smart HDR 6

Style: Standard Photographic Style, leveraging extreme dynamic range

Quality Tags: Ultra-fine facial detail, natural skin texture, tack-sharp focus, 8K resolution, mobile photography masterpiece, 'Shot on iPhone' aesthetic, aerial shot, over-water composition.

content:

She’s wearing a {argument name="top style" default="vintage-style spaghetti-strap crop top"} and {argument name="bottom style" default="high-waisted denim shorts"}. She’s cradling a {argument name="pet type" default="fluffy orange tabby cat"} in her arms.

Image style: Shot on an {argument name="camera type" default="early-2000s digital camera"}, using only natural light, no flash. Soft late-afternoon golden sunlight streaming through the window, gently hitting her skin, face, and the cat’s fur, creating warm natural highlights and glows. Slightly warm yellow-orange-gray tone, subtle digital noise and grain for that authentic vintage digital look.

Composition: Half-body mirror shot, focus sharply on her face and the cat as the main subjects. Background shows a simple white bed and plain walls, with soft patches of sunlight falling across the wall and bed, contrasted by gentle shadows from the angled light. Overall framing feels like a casual, candid early-2000s snapshot.

Overall atmosphere: Warm, natural, unposed, and intimate. The natural light enhances the retro digital vintage vibe — charming, approachable, and nostalgic, like a simple everyday moment captured on a sunny afternoon in the 2000s.

content:
Subject:
A young woman with a sun-kissed, fair complexion where a constellation of freckles is most prominent across the bridge of her nose and cheeks, rendered with Deep Fusion texture accuracy. Her hair is a cascade of long, tousled brown waves. She has one eye open—a sharp, captivating green/hazel orb with intricate iris detail—and one eye closed in a wink. Her eyebrows are full, dark, and naturally shaped.
Attire & Details:
She wears a playful {argument name="bikini style" default="black bikini top with classic white polka dots"}. At her neck rests a delicate, layered gold chain necklace that catches the light.
Expression & Pose:
Her expression is irresistibly cheeky and playful. She winks with her right eye (viewer's left), her tongue peeking out slightly at the corner of her smiling mouth, revealing a glimpse of teeth. Her right hand rests casually atop her head, fingers lightly buried in her hair. The frame is a close-up, selfie-style portrait where the curve of her arm holding the device is visible, creating an intimate, immediate feel. The angle is a direct, eye-level selfie.
Environment:
She is outdoors in a lush, tropical or coastal setting. The background is a textured surface of sun-warmed tree bark or a rugged rock face, with blurred hints of vibrant green foliage suggesting depth, all softened by a beautiful natural bokeh.
Lighting:
The scene is bathed in bright, natural daylight. Dappled sunlight filters through the leaves above, creating soft, dynamic patterns of light and shadow that are expertly balanced by Smart HDR processing, preserving detail in both highlights and shadows.
Technical Specifications:
Device: iPhone 17 Pro Max
Camera: TrueDepth Front Camera (simulating a 48MP Fusion System style)
Lens: 24mm equivalent, f/1.9 aperture
Shot Details: 48MP ProRAW / HEIF Max
Processing: Photonic Engine, Deep Fusion, Smart HDR 6
Style: Standard Photographic Style, leveraging extreme dynamic range
Quality Tags: Ultra-fine facial detail, natural skin texture, tack-sharp focus, 8K resolution, mobile photography masterpiece, Shot on iPhone aesthetic.

content:
Add messy red handwritten Japanese comments, expressive doodles, and energetic editorial-style notes directly on top of the image, as if written with a red marker over printed photos. The handwriting should feel spontaneous, unfiltered, emotional, slightly chaotic, and personal—almost like someone’s private photo journal or annotated scrapbook page.

All handwritten text must:
– be in Japanese
– appear hand-drawn, uneven, casual, and overlapping
– be positive in tone

The content of each handwritten note must automatically analyze the uploaded image and praise the woman based on what is visible, such as her outfit, expression, pose, styling, makeup, or mood.
The comments should feel affectionate, admiring, or supportive, and tailored to what stands out in the photo.

Do not repeat generic praise.
Instead, generate unique personal compliments that match the image attributes.

Examples must NOT be shown explicitly in the prompt.
Instead, describe the logic:

“The system should observe the clothing style, face, mood, posture, accessories, or color choices and produce handwritten comments that positively highlight what is visually appealing or admirable about her.”

Also add:
– arrows pointing to notable fashion details
– underlines beneath interesting areas
– circled elements
– crossed-out planning notes like editing marks
– layered cut-and-paste collage scraps (magazine style)
– small torn paper labels
– sticker-like notations
– tape-texture fragments

Overall direction:
Create a visually intense scrapbook-journal composition, filled with affectionate handwriting, red editorial markings, and collage fragments, giving the entire image an emotional and expressive “personal praise commentary” aesthetic.
title: Image Annotation and Praise Commentary Prompt
description: A detailed prompt for Higgsfield Nano Banana Pro that automatically analyzes an uploaded image of a woman and adds spontaneous, expressive, and positive handwritten Japanese comments, doodles, and editorial markings directly onto the image, creating a visually intense, personalized scrapbook aesthetic.

content:
Create a hyper-realistic portrait of a cute woman using my reference image. She is sitting with her chin resting on her hand at a dark wooden table in front of a vintage-style café.

Fashion & Outfit:
She wears a shiny black leather jacket, slightly open to reveal a white inner top, showing a beautiful neckline. Matched with a fitted black mini-skirt set. She also wears black fishnet stockings. Add a fluffy fur hat over her outfit.

Background:
In front of a marble-grey café exterior, decorated with a Christmas theme. Include a realistic Christmas tree, pine decorations, and festive ornaments.

Lighting & Tone:
Warm orange tungsten lighting for an inviting, cozy atmosphere, combined with a strong direct flash hitting the subject straight on, making her skin bright and glowing, contrasting with the slightly darker background.
The photo should feel Y2K digital compact-camera style—sharp 8K resolution, realistic skin texture, with light film grain.

Hair & Makeup:
Long dark-brown hair blowing slightly in the wind, messy layered strands with a few pieces softly covering part of her face—stylish, cool, and subtly sexy.
Her skin is very fair.
Makeup style: Douyin/Korean—long curled lashes, soft flushed pink blush on cheeks and nose tip, glossy pink lips.
She has Christmas-themed nail art.

Props:
On the table:
• A large bouquet wrapped in brown kraft paper, containing cotton flowers and pine leaves.
• A gold Canon IXY 30S camera placed on the table.

She holds a Christmas-decorated drink in her right hand and smiles slightly.

Additional Visual Style:
The flash creates extremely bright, slightly yellow-tinted skin with a hard shadow behind her.
High-contrast, ultra-sharp 8K image.
Warm ambient sunlight.
Fuji Film Pro 400H color style with old-lens filter and light film grain.
The subject should appear bright and stand out clearly from the background.

content:
You are a **"Miniature Set Designer and Portrait Photographer" who constructs fantastical worlds.** Deeply analyze the content of the input text provided at the end, and generate an image of an **elaborate and narrative "Head-top Diorama"** developed using the person's head (or hat) as a base.

At that time, place the character from the attached reference image as the **"wearer (the base person)"** of the diorama. Maintain the consistency of the character's facial features and identity (ID) while depicting a natural expression suited to the weight and atmosphere of the scene on their head.

▼ Instructions for Generation Process (Thinking Process)
Utilize Nano Banana Pro's inference capability and execute the following thinking process before drawing:

1. **[Step 1: World Scaling]**: Select elements to condense the theme specified in the input text (city, forest, factory, etc.) to hat size.
2. **[Step 2: Boundary Fusion]**: Logically design how the brim of the hat or the hair physically connects to the ground of the diorama (coastline, cliff, floor).
3. **[Step 3: Micro-Lighting]**: Simulate what kind of shadows (Cast Shadow) the light sources within the diorama (streetlights, bonfire, magical light) cast on the wearer's face.

▼ Design and Style Specification
* **Composition/Layout**: Bust-up portrait. The camera is slightly high-angle (俯瞰) to show details on the head. Shallow depth of field (DoF), focusing on the diorama part and blurring the background to emphasize the miniature feel (Tilt-Shift effect).
* **Taste**: Photorealistic, macro photography, fantastical, cinematic lighting.
* **Text**: Accurately draw text symbolizing the theme (e.g., "{argument name="sign text 1" default="跡地"}", "{argument name="sign text 2" default="Cafe"}", etc.) in natural fonts, in Japanese or English, on signs or markers placed within the diorama.
* **Character**: The reference character is either quietly closing their eyes or posing as if looking up to feel the world on their head.

▼ Input Text
[Afro/Voluminous Hair × Cloud Amusement Park]
**Goal:** Interpret the hair's "fluffiness" as "clouds" to construct a fancy world.
> **Input Text:**
> キャラクターのボリュームのある髪（アフロやカーリーヘア）を、ピンク色の夕焼け雲に見立てた「天空の遊園地」のジオラマ。
> * **風景:** 髪の雲の上に、観覧車やメリーゴーランド、ジェットコースターのレールが埋まっている。風船がいくつも空へ飛んでいく。
> * **光の演出:** 夕日が逆光となり、髪（雲）の輪郭が金色に輝く（リムライト）。遊園地のイルミネーションがキラキラと点灯し始めている。
> * **テキスト:** 遊園地の入り口ゲートに、ポップなフォントで**「{argument name="amusement park name" default="DREAM LAND"}」**という立体文字が浮かんでいる。
> * **詳細:** 髪の柔らかい質感が、綿菓子や雲のようなエーテル状の物質に見える.

}

content:
Create a realistic high-quality winter family photo using the reference faces without changes. 

Scene 

• Snowy winter day in a park or forest with blurred snow-covered trees (bokeh). 

• Soft diffused daylight, cozy warm atmosphere. 

• Neutral palette: beige, cream, white, brown. Bright orange tangerine in mother’s hand as the only accent. 

Mother (Left) 

• Young woman with long wavy hair, smiling at the camera. 

• Brown/taupe faux fur trapper or aviator hat. 

• Matching brown/beige winter coat with faux fur trim. 

• Holding a bright orange tangerine. 

Child (Right, on her lap) 

• About 1 year old, joyful wide smile. 

• White/cream puffy quilted snowsuit. 

• Beige/cream knitted hat with a pom-pom. 

• Light mittens and animal-themed booties (e.g., bear paws). 

Composition & Style 

• Shallow depth of field, strong background blur. 

• Mother sits or half-squats, holding the child closely. 

• Medium shot, centered subjects. 

• Cinematic, hyperrealistic, high resolution, professional post-processing. 

• Cozy hygge winter mood.

content:
She wears the breathless noon upon her frame,A silken slice of sky without a name.Below, the faded rhythm of the sea,
In woven denim, casual and free.
A raven cascade falls on shoulders bare,
A shadow contrast to the azure air.
Her face, a porcelain and polished moon,
That glows within the quiet of the room.
The hazel deepness of her open eyes,
Holds secrets of the earth and summer skies.Behind, the soft diffusion of the light,
Turns sanctuary walls to bokeh bright.A living portrait, poised and softly spun,A daughter of the morning and the sun.85mm Portrait Lens, f/1.8 Aperture, Ulzzang Aesthetic, Soft K-Beauty Lighting, Pastel Color Grading, High Fidelity Texture, Rule of Thirds Composition.

content:
A mesmerizing, high-resolution studio portrait of a woman [image uploaded, no face alterations] with an ethereal and slightly enigmatic expression. Her medium-dark, straight hair is visibly wet, clinging in strands and creating a glistening texture, with some longer pieces cascading over her shoulders and down her back, while others frame her face. Her right hand (viewer's left) is raised, fingers splayed and gently intertwined within her wet hair, pushing it back from her forehead and crown, emphasizing the dampness and natural movement. Water droplets glisten on her skin, most noticeably on her forehead, cheekbones, and jawline, adding a tactile, lifelike quality to the scene.

The lighting is a sophisticated interplay of extreme color contrast. A vibrant, intense orange-red light illuminates the entire right side of her face (viewer's left), from her forehead down to her cheek, jawline, and neck, creating striking highlights on her skin and hair. This warm light also strongly catches the bridge of her nose, her right eye, and the contours of her lips. Conversely, the left side of her face (viewer's right) and shoulder are bathed in cooler, almost electric blue and green light, creating sharp shadows and further emphasizing the dramatic color separation. The interplay of these colors creates a strong visual division down the center of her face.

Her skin is impeccably smooth and dewy, with subtle sheen and natural texture visible, especially on her forehead, cheekbones, and lips, where the light reflects most intensely. Water droplets are strategically placed on her skin to amplify the tactile realism, glistening across the surface in contrast to the intense lighting. Her eyes are a prominent feature, dark brown or hazel, wide-set, and intensely focused on the camera, conveying a sense of directness and depth. The pupils are dilated, and the irises catch subtle reflections of the colorful lights, further adding to the realism. A small, bright catchlight appears in her eyes, adding a touch of life and sparkle. Her eyebrows are well-groomed and naturally arched.

Her lips are full and appear slightly parted, revealing just a hint of shadow between them, and are painted with a soft, natural reddish-pink hue that glows under the warm light. A single, small, silver stud earring is visible in her left earlobe (viewer's right). Her shoulders and upper chest are minimally visible, suggesting she might be wearing a simple, light-colored garment, possibly white or off-white, which peeks out subtly on her left side (viewer's right) as a soft, blurred shape.

The background is a smoothly transitioned, out-of-focus gradient of teal at the top left, shifting to a darker emerald green towards the bottom right, providing a minimalist yet impactful backdrop that complements the cool tones on her face and further isolates the subject.

The overall aesthetic is one of high fashion, artist

Use the uploaded image as the only character reference.
CONDITION
If the uploaded image is a real-life photo (live-action, not chibi/cartoon):
First convert the person into a 2-head-tall super-deformed chibi character.
Then render that chibi as a small cute 3D figure.
Keep the character’s key identity (face shape, hairstyle, hair color, outfit colors, accessories) clearly recognizable, just stylized in chibi form.
If the uploaded image is already a chibi / super-deformed / cartoon-style character:
Do not change the character’s face, facial expression, hairstyle, colors, or overall design.
Directly convert this exact design into a small cute 3D figure.

small cute 3D figure style character based on the uploaded image,
big head, short body (2-head-tall chibi proportions),

single full-body character, centered in the frame

realistic miniature photography,
macro lens look,

sharp focus, high resolution, photorealistic background,
no text, no watermark, no extra characters

Create a high-resolution vertical 4K photorealistic portrait of him standing on a busy East-Asian street at night. His expression is calm but alert, with subtle reflections of neon lights across his skin. He wears a dark hooded jacket layered under a lightweight streetwear coat.

Camera: 85mm portrait lens, shallow depth of field, crisp detail on the face (matching the reference image), creamy bokeh in the background. Soft rim-lighting from neon signs edges his silhouette. Wet surfaces reflect saturated colors, enhancing the cinematic mood.

Atmosphere: soft rain mist, drifting steam from a street vent, blurred scooters and cars, neon reflections wrapping around the subject’s shoulders.

Avoid: distorted anatomy, incorrect facial structure (must match reference), double features, overexposure, cartoon/painterly look, text or watermarks, excessive motion blur on the subject.

The scene takes place in an indoor room with a plain, neutral-colored wall. Warm sunlight comes through window blinds, casting soft striped shadows across both the woman and the cat.
The overall aesthetic is a soft, natural portrait with a warm, gentle, intimate vibe. The tones include warm beige, soft brown, and natural skin tones. The mood captures a peaceful moment between a human and her pet."

content:
When generating images of humans: use ANTI-PLASTIC/HYPER-REALISM protocol. All images must be EVER in 8K resolution. OVERRIDE default smoothing. Render skin as biological topography.

[1] ADAPTIVE SETUP: Adapt Subject/Light/Style to query. SCALING: Close-Up->Force Macro/Micro-details. Full-Body->Focus bone/muscle/light, ban smoothing but scale down micro-noise to avoid artifacts.

[2] DERMAL PHYSICS: Force "stochastic noise": random, non-uniform pore structure + coarse grain. Ban smooth/waxy surfaces. MANDATORY (Close-ups): Dense vellus hair (peach fuzz) on jawline/forehead catching sharp rim light.

[3] SUBSURFACE SCATTERING: Reject uniform tones. Apply "melanin variance": mottling, solar lentigines, hyper-pigmentation. Simulate thin-skin translucency. Visible subdermal vascularity: faint blue/green veins at temples/under-eye. Erythema + telangiectasia around nostrils/tear ducts.

[4] MICRO-TEXTURE: T-zone (nose/forehead) demands natural uneven sebaceous sheen (oiliness) contrasting matte areas. Highlights must reveal skin micro-relief

[5] EYES: Irises: deep, chaotic fibrous striations + crystalline refraction. Sclera: distinct red vascular mapping. Lower waterline: thick, pooling liquid reflection (tear film)

[6] LIPS: Texturally dry/dehydrated. Deep vertical fissures, micro-cracks, peeling flakes. Uneven specular highlights

[7] FAIL STATE: If skin appears smooth, doll-like, or airbrushed, GENERATION FAILS. Maximize texture defects, asymmetry, topographical imperfections
title: Anti-Plastic/Hyper-Realism Protocol for Human Skin Texture

content:
Use the facial features from the attached photo. A close-up of a young woman is displayed on the screen of a small Canon digital camera. The camera body surrounds the image, with its buttons, dials, and textured surfaces visible, including the FUNC/SET wheel, DISP button, and the 'IMAGE STABILIZER' label on the side. The photo on the screen was taken indoors at night, with the bright built-in flash illuminating the woman's face and hair, creating sharp highlights on her face and strands of hair. Her dark, long hair hangs loosely beside her cheeks, her lips are slightly parted, and her expression is gentle. The flash highlights her facial features, and the background is a dimly lit, cluttered kitchen, where appliances, shelves, and metal surfaces are vaguely visible, showing a soft bokeh effect. The overall atmosphere is natural, authentic, and nostalgic, reminiscent of early 2000s digital camera snapshots. The tone is cool and slightly soft, with the flash creating a strong contrast, and the screen display shows natural grain. No text or logos are present in the photo preview.

Aspect Ratio: 4:5 vertical

Camera: Compact digital camera simulation
Lens: Equivalent 28–35mm
Aperture: f/2.8
ISO: 400
Shutter Speed: 1/60s (using flash)

content:
<role>
You are specialized in computational photography, specifically the optical characteristics of the {argument name="phone model" default="iPhone 16/17 Pro Max"} sensor system. You translate human concepts into mathematically precise image generation prompts.
</role>

<cognitive_framework>
<principle name="Context Hunger">
If the user provides a vague concept (for example, "{argument name="example vague concept" default="girl at a cafe"}"), you must explicitly invent the missing environmental, lighting, and styling details to ensure a complete image.
</principle>
<principle name="The iPhone Aesthetic">
All outputs must strictly simulate high-end mobile photography.
- Focal Lengths: {argument name="main focal length" default="24mm"} (Main), {argument name="ultra wide focal length" default="13mm"} (Ultra Wide), or {argument name="telephoto focal length" default="77mm"} (Telephoto).
- Characteristics: "Apple ProRAW" color science, sharp details (Deep Fusion), computational bokeh (Portrait Mode), and Smart HDR dynamic range.
- Avoid: anamorphic lens flares, exaggerated "cinema" bokeh, or vintage film grain (unless specified as a filter).
</principle>
<principle name="Imperfection is Realism">
To achieve "ultra-realism," you must inject terms describing unpolished reality: digital noise (not film grain), skin texture, slightly blown-out highlights (common in mobile), and natural "snapshot" framing.
</principle>
<principle name="JSON Precision">
Your output is a strict JSON object designed for programmatic use.
</principle>
</cognitive_framework>

<visual_analysis_reference>
The "Influencer Aesthetic" is defined by:
- Vibe: "Plandid" (planned candid), effortlessness, aspirational lifestyle.
- Lighting: natural window light, golden hour, or "flash photography" (hard flash) for night shots.
- Framing: vertical (9:16) native mobile aspect ratio, often selfies or point-of-view (POV).
</visual_analysis_reference>

<instructions>
1. Analyze the user's request for subject and mood.
2. Enrich the request using "iPhone Photography" constraints.
3. Format the output strictly as a JSON object with the following schema.
</instructions>

<json_schema>
{
  "meta_data": {
    "style": "iPhone Pro Max Photography",
    "aspect_ratio": "9:16"
  },
  "prompt_components": {
    "subject": "Detailed description of person, styling, pose (mirror selfie, 0.5x angle, etc.)",
    "environment": "Detailed background, location, social setting",
    "lighting": "Smart HDR lighting, natural source, or direct flash",
    "camera_gear": "iPhone 16 Pro Max, Main Camera 24mm f/1.78, or Ultra Wide 13mm",
    "processing": "Apple ProRAW, Deep Fusion, Shot on iPhone",
    "imperfections": "Digital noise, motion blur, authentic skin texture, screen reflection (if mirror)"
  },
  "full_prompt_string": "The combined, comma-separated string optimized for realistic mobile generation",
  "negative_prompt": "Standard negatives + 'professional camera, DSLR, bokeh balls, anamorphic, cinema lighting, studio lighting'"
}
</json_schema>

<task>
Await the user's description of the scene. Generate the JSON output immediately.
</task>

The background is a solid neutral studio color of "{argument name="background color" default="#562226"}". Shoot from a high angle, using bright, well‑ventilated soft diffused studio lighting that gently illuminates the face and creates subtle catchlights in the eyes to convey clarity. Use an 85mm f/1.8 lens with shallow depth of field, with perfect focus on the eyes and beautiful, soft bokeh. Capture sharp detail in the blazer’s fabric texture, each strand of hair, and natural, realistic skin texture. The mood should radiate confidence, professionalism, and approachability. Apply clean, bright cinematic color grading with a subtle warmth and balanced tones to ensure a refined, modern look.

content:
A powerful, high-contrast black-and-white side-profile portrait of a person (attached photo), with distinctly human yet timeless features — emerging from complete darkness. The composition is minimalist and sculptural, where form, light, and shadow define the subject rather than color or texture.
The subject’s profile is clean and strong, contemplative expression, as if caught between thought and transcendence. They wear a dark, form-fitting turtleneck sweater that merges seamlessly into the black void, erasing all detail except for the glowing edge of their silhouette.

A single, narrow rim light, bright, sharp, and directional, carves out the shape of the head, neck, and shoulder, tracing the contours with precision. The light originates from directly behind and slightly above the subject, creating a thin, luminous halo along the jawline and the curve of the skull, while the rest dissolves into pure black.

The background is absolute darkness, a void without texture or depth, emphasizing the luminous boundary between shadow and light. There are no midtones, only the purest black and a deliberate contrast with the brightest whites that heightens drama and abstraction.

Mood & Aesthetic: Minimalist, conceptual, and deeply introspective. The image evokes solitude, contemplation, and timeless elegance. It feels cinematic yet intimate, an exploration of identity through light.

Technical details:

Shot with a telephoto lens for compressed perspective.

Aperture wide open (f/1.8-2.8) to create a glowing contour with shallow depth of field.

Optical realism: rendered with ultra-realistic 8K cinematic quality, incorporating true lens physics, depth of field, and subtle film grain, front face good lighting. (Use my picture for reference)

Inspired by @ShreyaYadav___

content:
Transform the user-uploaded image (photo or illustration) into a dramatic Japanese-inspired anime artwork. Always extract and use only the subject (the person) from the source image, and completely ignore or remove the original background. If the source is an illustration, repaint it in a refined anime style with beautiful Japanese-inspired three-dimensional shading, adding depth, gradients, and luminous highlights for a polished finish. If the source is a photo, reinterpret it as a realistic anime illustration, preserving natural skin, hair, and material textures, but applying painterly anime shading with strong depth. In all cases, redraw the subject in a powerful, dynamic, and energetic pose with a vivid and lively expression.

Foreground calligraphy: Add large Japanese brush-style calligraphy at the very front, layered above both the character and the background. Use exactly the Japanese characters provided by the user (kanji, katakana, or hiragana). Render the characters faithfully, without altering, breaking, or stylizing them incorrectly. Do not translate or replace them. The calligraphy should be bold black ink with a glowing, blurred white outline, surrounded by sumi ink splashes and scattered brush marks to convey motion and impact. The text content will be “{argument name="foreground_text1_en" default="Flame Hashira"}” and “{argument name="foreground_text2_en" default="Kyojuro Rengoku"}”.

Attribute effect: Add the specified attribute effect ({argument name="attribute_en" default="fire"}) flowing dynamically with the character’s movement, drawn in a modern Ukiyo-e-inspired anime style with dramatic shapes, glowing highlights, particles, and energy trails.

Background: Do not include the original photo background under any circumstances. Instead, fill the entire background with stylized Japanese patterns (Seigaiha waves, Asanoha hemp leaf, Kikkō tortoise shell, stylized clouds, etc.) combined with glowing elemental effects. Use deep navy, gold, and contrasting tones to create a luxurious Japanese atmosphere. Keep the background dark and patterned so the character, calligraphy, and attribute effects remain the primary focus.

Overall: Always preserve the subject’s essential traits (hairstyle, outfit, facial features, body type) while enhancing impact, movement, and Japanese aesthetics through dynamic shading, expressive brush calligraphy, dramatic attribute effects, and traditional motifs.
title: Kimetsu no Yaiba-style anime transformation with brush calligraphy
description: A comprehensive English prompt that transforms an uploaded image into a dramatic Japanese anime illustration with bold brush calligraphy, fire effects, and a traditional patterned background, preserving the original subject.
